news.Title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Announces $30 Billion Broadcom Deal to Produce 15 Billion Chips
news.Content: Apple 's (NASDAQ: AAPL) outgoing CEO, Tim Cook, just announced a landmark partnership with custom-silicon specialist Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO). The agreement focuses on designing and producing custom silicon components alongside advanced wireless connectivity technologies for Apple's products. Apple's commitment to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple announced a landmark partnership with Broadcom (AVGO), committing over $30 billion to design and produce custom silicon components and wireless technologies through 2031.
• The agreement includes a $1.5 billion investment by Broadcom to expand its Colorado facility, supporting Apple's American Manufacturing Program.
• Custom ASICs are crucial for AI infrastructure due to their power efficiency and performance, and Broadcom's expertise in this area is a key competitive advantage.
• This deal provides Broadcom with substantial revenue visibility, diversifies its ASIC portfolio beyond hyperscalers, and reinforces its role in both device-level and infrastructure-level custom silicon.
news.Keywords: custom silicon, wireless connectivity, AI infrastructure, ASIC market, revenue visibility

news.Title: Shares of Intel and AMD Have Plummeted in the Last Few Days. Is It Time to Panic?
news.Content: There have been few happier investors than Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) and AMD (NASDAQ: AMD) investors in 2026. If you purchased shares at the start of 2026, the returns have been phenomenal. Since the calendar flipped to July, there has ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel (INTC) and AMD (AMD) stocks have experienced significant declines (20% and over 10% respectively) in early July after strong performance earlier in 2026.
• Both companies are considered turnaround plays, but they face intense competition from Nvidia in GPUs and TSMC in foundries, with rivals showing superior growth and scale.

news.Keywords: stock decline, competitive landscape, data center growth, valuation concerns, turnaround plays

news.Title: 全球股票009826、VT、VWRA怎麼選？達人真心話：卡關是費用 3理由賣VT選它
news.Content: 無腦懶人投資首選，就是全球股票ETF，將風險分散到全球，從此安心睡好好生活，讓時間複利幫你滾出退休金，那009826、VT、VWRA怎麼選？暢銷書《有錢到老後》作家嫺人表示，VT持股最多，可能有遺產稅的問題；VWRA成本最低，但 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• VT持股最多（約1萬檔），但可能面臨美國遺產稅問題；VWRA成本最低（約0.19%內扣），但交易機制需適應。

• ETF的選擇應基於個人投資目標、風險承受能力及資產配置策略，而非僅因熱門而追逐。

news.Title: 魏哲家一句「非常有信心」先把答案說了？台積電6月營收上看4300億元　市場等13日揭牌
news.Content: 對法人圈來說，這6個字不是普通的信心喊話，而更像是 台積電 高層對第2季營運表現已有充分掌握後，提前釋出的態度。如今市場最關心的問題，已不只是6月營 ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: AI需求未降溫！大摩揭供應鏈真相：台積電CoWoS、HBM需求持續爆滿
news.Content: 近來市場對人工智慧（AI）是否已經「過熱」議論不休，一派憂心資本支出過猛、投資報酬跟不上腳步；但摩根士丹利最新的產業報告提出另一個觀察角度：與其聽各方隔空論戰，不如直接檢視供應鏈的排隊實況。從雲端業 ...

news.Title: If You Have $1,000 to Invest in EV Stocks, Should It Go to Tesla or Rivian?

news.Title: Advanced Micro Devices vs. Texas Instruments: Which Technology Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
news.Content: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) and Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) represent two different ways to play the semiconductor market. Choosing between them depends on whether you prefer high-growth expansion or a steady, diversified chip manufacturer. AMD focuses on high-performance processors and artificial intelligence accelerators for data centers and gaming. Texas Instruments designs analog chips that manage power and signals in everything from cars to industrial machinery. Comparing these two helps identify which aligns with your personal risk tolerance and growth goals. The case for Advanced Micro ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) reported FY25 revenue of nearly $34.6 billion, a 34.3% increase YoY, with net income of $4.3 billion and a net margin of 12.5%.
• Texas Instruments (TXN) reported FY25 revenue of $17.7 billion, a 13.0% increase YoY, with net income of $5.0 billion and a strong net margin of 28.3%.
• AMD faces risks from export controls and reliance on third-party foundries, while TXN is sensitive to economic cycles in industrial and automotive markets.
• AMD's free cash flow was $6.7 billion, while TXN's was $2.6 billion; TXN exhibits a higher current ratio (4.4x vs 2.9x) and lower debt-to-equity ratio (0.9x vs 0.1x).
news.Keywords: semiconductor market, high-performance computing, analog chips, AI accelerators, revenue growth, net margin

news.Title: Rackspace Technology Cuts 2026 Outlook as $250M Stock Sale Fuels AI Push
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Rackspace Technology, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better. Rackspace is doubling down on enterprise AI infrastructure , launching a $250 million at-the-market equity offering to fund GPU-related growth and positioning itself as an operator of the "full enterprise AI stack." Management said the strategy emphasizes private cloud, regulated and sovereign deployments, and AI partnerships such as Palantir, AMD, VMware, Rubrik and Uniphore. The company cut its 2026 outlook after exiting lower-margin public and private cloud revenue streams, with full-year revenue now expected at $2.45 billion to $2.55 billion and EBITDA at $285 million to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rackspace Technology is launching a $250 million equity offering to fund its enterprise AI infrastructure push, focusing on private cloud and AI partnerships.
• The company cut its 2026 outlook, expecting full-year revenue between $2.45 billion and $2.55 billion, and EBITDA between $285 million and $295 million.
• Rackspace plans a multiyear GPU expansion, including an AMD-based deployment of nearly 2 megawatts by end-2026, targeting 30 megawatts by end-2028.
• The near-term financial hit is attributed to investing ahead of AI growth, with benefits anticipated from 2027 onwards.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, equity offering, GPU expansion, financial outlook, enterprise AI, AMD partnership

news.Title: Mark Zuckerberg Is Turning Meta Into a Bigger Chipmaker. Its Newest In-House AI Chip Enters Production in September.

The market's enthusiasm is easy to understand. Meta expects to spend ...

news.Title: 【iPhone 18漲價潮2】漲價受惠股點點名！專家揭台積電、大立光、鴻海等蘋概股誰最吃香
news.Content: 市場傳出蘋果iPhone 18系列將因零組件成本增加而調漲售價，引發市場關注漲價效應是否擴散至供應鏈。專家表示，iPhone售價調升對台灣供應鏈來說偏向正面解讀，可提升上游供應商的議價空間，但若要沿著題材布局，仍須 ...

• 下游組裝廠如鴻海、和碩可能面臨壓力，投資布局應優先鎖定具技術優勢、議價能力的供應商。

news.Title: Has Meta ever had a stock split? What sets this ‘Mag 7’ stock apart
news.Content: Meta Platforms has a lot in common with its "Magnificent 7" brethren. Like Nvidia , Apple , Alphabet , Microsoft , Amazon , and Tesla , Meta is a technology giant with a market capitalization exceeding $1 trillion. Its stock has dramatically outperformed the broader S&P 500 over the past decade, and the company is investing heavily in artificial intelligence ( AI ). But one key difference sets Meta apart. Unlike every ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms, a 'Magnificent 7' stock, has never executed a stock split since its 2012 IPO, unlike peers like Nvidia, Apple, and Tesla.
• The absence of stock splits is attributed to the rise of fractional share trading, making them less necessary for affordability.
• Meta's stock price has increased significantly since its IPO, with a $10,000 investment potentially growing to $176,000.
• The company is prioritizing its aggressive AI plans, raising its 2026 capital expenditure guidance to $125-$145 billion, over considering a stock split.
news.Keywords: stock split, Magnificent Seven, AI investment, capital expenditure, share price performance, IPO

news.Title: A Potential New Rival Wants to Undercut TSMC. Here's What Investors Need to Know.
news.Content: Throughout the massive growth of artificial intelligence and the infrastructure that powers it, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM) has been a consistent winner. TSMC, as it's known, is the world's largest chip foundry, producing advanced semiconductors for Nvidia , Advanced Micro Devices , Broadcom , and many others. TSMC holds a dominant 73% market share in the global foundry market, with second-place Samsung at only 7%. But a Japanese company, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• A new Japanese company, Rapidus, plans to enter the advanced 2 nm chip market by 2027, aiming to undercut TSMC's pricing with a reported wafer cost of $21,000 compared to TSMC's $30,000.
• Despite the new competition, TSMC's dominant 73% market share and proven track record in advanced chip manufacturing (25% revenue from 3nm, 36% from 5nm in Q1) suggest it is well-positioned to maintain its leadership.
• TSMC reported Q1 revenue of $35.9 billion, up 40.6% year-over-year, and forecasts Q2 revenue between $39 billion and $40.2 billion with an operating profit margin of 56.5%-58.5%.
• Rapidus faces significant challenges in scaling production and achieving profitability, as even established players like Samsung and Intel have struggled to gain substantial market share against TSMC.
news.Keywords: semiconductor foundry, market share, advanced nodes, pricing competition, manufacturing scale

news.Content: September S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESU26) are down -0.11%, and September Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQU26) are down -0.41% this morning, taking a breather after a chip-led rally in the prior session, with all eyes on the U.S. trading debut of SK Hynix. Chip and AI infrastructure stocks slipped in pre-market trading as investors turned cautious ahead of SK Hynix's debut on Wall Street. Analysts view the South Korean memory chip giant's U.S. listing as a fresh test of investor appetite for the AI trade. More News from Barchart Intel Stock Is 'Too Good to Ignore' as HSBC Sets a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Chip and AI infrastructure stocks experienced a pullback in pre-market trading ahead of SK Hynix's U.S. debut, seen as a test of investor appetite for AI investments.
• Arm Holdings (ARM) surged over 9% in the previous trading session, contributing to a rally in chip and AI infrastructure stocks.
• The article notes that while some chip stocks rallied, others like memory stocks have entered a bear market, indicating sector rotation.
• Inflation driven by strong AI demand is a concern for the Federal Reserve, potentially influencing interest rate decisions.
news.Keywords: AI trade, chip stocks, market rotation, IPO debut, inflation concerns

news.Title: 毛利率近80%！ 南亞科第二季EPS 14.66元 創歷史新高
news.Content:
不畏巴威颱風風雨，記憶體大廠南亞科技（2408）於今（10）日如期舉行法說會，根據公司公布的財報，第2季毛利率高達79.5%，稅後淨利501.92億元，季增68.2%，單季每股純益14.66元，創下歷史新高。

而第2季營收則來到825.49億元，較上季增68.2%，DRAM平均售價季增逾六成，銷售量則與上季持平；上半年稅後純益更來到762.5億元，EPS達23.38元，每股淨值93.49元。

總經理李培瑛於線上法說會中表示，AI需求持續高速成長，正推動全球記憶體產業出現結構性改變，DRAM產品的景氣循環波動影響大幅減弱。雲端資料中心AI伺服器及一般伺服器需求同步強勁，大幅推升高頻寬記憶體（HBM）與伺服器用Registered DIMM（RDIMM）需求，並排擠手機、PC、車用及消費性電子等一般DRAM產品供給，使市場持續吃緊。李培瑛預期，供應不足情況可望延續數季。

產業方面，李培瑛指出，公司主要客戶與供應商積極簽訂數年期長約（LTA），確保未來供應穩定。記憶體廠商也正擴充產能並調整產品組合，以提高高毛利產品比重。新產能規劃多依長約需求執行，預計至2028年才會大幅增加產能，短期內供需緊張狀況不會緩解。

李培瑛說，AI發展持續帶動高效能記憶體（HBM、LPDDR5）與企業級SSD、SmartNIC、BMC等應用對高容量、高效能DRAM的需求，資料傳輸及儲存需求同步提升。隨產能被高階產品排擠，一般通用型DRAM供給持續受限，終端市場也逐漸朝高階產品發展，帶動高階電視等終端產品需求成長，低階產品則面臨壓力，未來手機電視等產品售價有望隨成本調整。

李培瑛強調，AI產業正推動記憶體進入新的結構性成長階段，市場需求快速擴大、供需缺口仍大，也加速Hybrid AI、Agent AI、Token運算、Physical AI等創新應用發展，持續推升高效能記憶體市場，南亞科技未來將持續拓展客製化AI、WoW及高附加價值產品，積極把握產業新機遇。

觀察三大法人動向，三大法人皆站在買方，9日外資大買南亞科1萬5430張，投信買超3250張，自營商買超1254張，合計買超1萬9934張，9日股價也來到435.5元鎖漲停亮燈，縣釋出市場看好南亞科的前景。

news.Title: 南亞科Q2毛利率逼近八成，單季每股賺14.66元，新廠資本支出4,800億
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】受惠於單季DRAM的ASP大增超過六成，南亞科(2408)第二季毛利率逼近八成，單季大賺超過500億元，第二季每股淨利14.66元 。公司今日也揭露，旗下新廠第一階段規劃於2028年達每月投片量3萬片，預估全產能4.5萬片、資本支出將達4,800億元。南亞科今(10)日公佈2026年第二季成績單，單季營收825億4千9百萬元，較上季增加68.2%。第二季DRAM平均售價季增超過六十位數百分比，銷售量與上季持平。

此外，南亞科第二季營業毛利為656億1千9百萬元，毛利率79.5%，較上季提升11.6個百分點。營業淨利為608億2千6百萬元，營業淨利率73.7%，較上季提升12.4個百分點，營業外收入15億3百萬元，本期稅後淨利為501億9千2百萬元，淨利率60.8%。單季每股淨利14.66元 (依加權平均流通在外股數34.23億股計算)。

累計今年上半年年南亞科稅後淨利達762.5億元，每股淨利23.38元 (依加權平均流通在外股數32.62億股計算)，每股淨值93.49元 (依流通在外股數34.50億股計算)。

南亞科也揭露，今年上半年應用於AI 基礎設施及伺服器的產品營收占比已超過20%，同時亦持續供應DDR5、LPDDR5/5X、DDR4、LPDDR4/4X、DDR3及LPDDR3產品，此外，公司將持續拓展客製化AI/WoW與AI基礎設施等高附加價值產品；第三代、第四代、第五代10奈米級製程(1C/1D/1E)及EUV等研發工作，均按原定計畫順利進行。

news.Title: 科技樂觀情緒上揚 日股收漲
news.Content:
（中央社東京2026年7月10日綜合外電報導）美光科技公司宣布將提高資本支出，日股在科技類股帶動下上揚。日本財務大臣片山皋月表示，鼓勵包括政府年金投資基金在內的養老基金增加對國內金融資產投資，也提振市場信心。

日股基準日經225指數上漲813.88點或1.20%，收68557.73點。

東證股價指數上漲15.71點或0.39%，收4036.08點。

news.Title: 南亞科看價格漲勢延續，H2毛利率將續改善
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-10 15:46:42 周佩宇 發佈

南亞科(2408)今(10)日舉行法說會，總經理李培瑛(附圖)表示，AI正重新改變全球記憶體產業結構，高頻寬記憶體（HBM）、RDIMM及低功耗DDR5等AI相關產品需求快速成長，不僅推升整體市場需求，也排擠一般PC、手機、車用及消費性產品供給，使記憶體供需缺口持續擴大。他預期，目前供給不足情況仍將延續數季以上，今年第三、第四季DRAM平均售價仍將高於第二季，雖然第二季毛利率達79.5%、EPS亦接近一個半股本達歷史新高，但後續毛利率還是可望持續改善。

李培瑛指出，AI需求已不再侷限於GPU，隨著CPU、TPU、ASIC等AI晶片快速發展，帶動HBM、LPDDR5需求同步增加，AI資料中心也推升Enterprise SSD、SmartNIC、BMC等高容量、高功能產品需求。由於供應商持續將產能轉向高附加價值產品，手機、PC、車用及消費性記憶體供給受到排擠，部分中低階產品價格也開始調整，整體市場正朝高階化發展。

他表示，目前產業已逐漸形成長期供貨模式，各家供應商的新產能多建立於多年期供應合約基礎，預估最快2028年後才會陸續開出，因此短期內難以明顯舒緩供給缺口。雖然三星、SK海力士、美光等大廠持續擴產，但以韓廠為例，五年平均年增幅約15%，屬合理成長速度，並非爆發式擴充，反而反映市場需求長期向上，對整體產業供需結構仍屬正向。

至於市場關注終端產品因價格上漲而縮減記憶體容量，李培瑛認為，各市場會依自身成本及售價接受度調整產品規格，屬正常市場機制。目前需求仍大於供給，不同市場只是承受能力不同。他指出，南亞科目前產能已滿載，第三季價格將高於第二季，2026年營運成長主要來自售價提升，而非出貨量增加，在價格續揚下，毛利率仍有持續優化空間。

連三月營收創高，鈺創Q2營收季增逾2倍

三星態度強硬 傳Q3通用型DRAM、LPDDR擬漲價20%

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 南亞科長約已佔五成；加速新製程及新廠布局
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-10 15:46:48 周佩宇 發佈

南亞科(2408)今(10)日舉行法說會，總經理李培瑛表示，今(2026)年上半年AI基礎設施及伺服器相關產品營收占比已超過20%，涵蓋伺服器DRAM及Enterprise SSD、NIC、BMC等高階網通產品，目前NVIDIA、Google、Microsoft、Qualcomm、Intel及AMD皆為合作客戶。隨著AI需求快速增加，公司目前長期供貨合約（LTA）已占整體產能約五成，未來將持續把短約逐步轉為長約，配合客戶需求規劃後續產能。

李培瑛表示，公司先前透過私募引進四家大型策略合作夥伴，包括美國的SanDisk與Cisco、日本的鎧俠，韓國SK海力士旗下的Solidigm，目前將全力履行相關長約內容，後續也會依不同客戶需求安排產能配置，不排除增加其他合作夥伴。

技術布局方面，李培瑛指出，目前1C製程已開始試產且進展順利，1D製程正在開發，預計近期進入試產階段；DDR5目前約占公司營收一成，下半年LPDDR5將開始進行客戶驗證。因應AI客製化需求，公司也同步推進Wafer Bonding、3D IC、TSV等先進封裝技術，以及客製化記憶體方案，未來若需求持續放大，將配合增加相關設備及新廠空間。

產能規劃方面，新廠第一階段將於2028年達成每月投片3萬片，2029年提升至3.6萬片，後續朝4.5萬片規模擴充，但仍須視AI基礎設施需求及設備建置進度而定。李培瑛表示，2026年資本支出約500多億元，2027年內部規劃約2,000多億元，仍待董事會核准；若新廠全面到位，總投資金額約4,800億元，目前公司資金仍可支應，暫無募資需求，但募資仍可作長遠規劃。

力旺1T NeoFlash採用標準邏輯製程，推進加快

台積電：2030年半導體市場將突破1.5兆美元

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

Top Stock Reports for Apple, KLA Corp. & Western Digital

Ahead of Wall Street

The daily 'Ahead of Wall Street' article is a must-read for all investors who would like to be ready for that day's trading action. The article comes out before the market opens, attempting to make sense of that morning's economic releases and how they will affect that day's market action. Today's Featured Research Reports

Apple' s shares have underperformed the Zacks Computer - Micro Computers industry over the last six months (+20.4% vs. +24.0%). Per the Zacks analyst, supply constraints, higher component costs and an uncertain tariff environment could pressure product availability and margins. Regulatory scrutiny, App Store disputes and antitrust challenges also remain key overhangs, supporting a balanced outlook.

Yet, strong demand for the latest iPhone lineup, expanding Services and a growing device ecosystem remain positives. New products, business-focused offerings, and continued shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks could support long-term engagement and the stock.

(You can read the full research report on Apple here >>>)

KLA' s shares have outperformed the Electronics – Miscellaneous Products industry over the last six months (+54.8% vs. +36.4%). The Zacks analyst believes that the company benefits from AI-driven semiconductor investment, strengthening its leadership in process control, advanced packaging and services. Healthy free cash flow supports dividends and share repurchases, while demand trends remain favorable.

Story Continues

However, export controls, tariff uncertainty and customer concentration remain key risks. Gross margin pressure from elevated DRAM-related system costs is also expected to persist, keeping the overall outlook balanced.

(You can read the full research report on KLA here >>>)

Western Digital' s shares have outperformed the Zacks Computer - Storage Devices industry over the past year (+745.8% vs. +455.7%). The Zacks analyst believes that the company is benefiting from AI-driven storage demand, strong cloud spending and favorable pricing. Higher-capacity drives, technology advances and improved operating efficiency support margins, while a stronger balance sheet enhances financial flexibility.

Yet, intense competition and customer concentration remain key risks. These factors could pressure growth and profitability despite favorable demand trends.

(You can read the full research report on Western Digital here >>>)

Optex Systems' shares have underperformed the Zacks Aerospace - Defense Equipment industry over the past year (+6.1% vs. +20.2%). The Zacks analyst believes that gross margin and operating income have come under pressure from an unfavorable sales mix and higher administrative costs. Backlog has softened, particularly in periscopes and laser filters, creating some near-term uncertainty.

However, Optex Systems is benefiting from improving demand, supported by strong order growth and multi-year contract wins that enhance production visibility. Solid liquidity, expanding optical assemblies demand and attractive valuation relative to peers add to its appeal.

news.Title: DRAM賺翻了！南亞科Q2毛利率79.5％超車台積電 上半年EPS狂衝23元
news.Content:
記憶體大廠南亞科今（10）日召開線上法說會，第二季營運表現驚豔市場。其中，第二季毛利率衝上79.5%，不僅較上季顯著提升11.6個百分點，更超越台積電的毛利率（第一季毛利率66.25%）表現。

新廠預計2028年起開出產能

受惠於DRAM價格大幅上漲，南亞科第二季營收達825.49億元，季增68.2%，其中，DRAM平均售價季增超過60%，銷售量則與上季持平。單季毛利率來到79.5%，季增11.6個百分點；營業淨利為608.26億元，營益率達73.7%，提升12.4個百分點；稅後淨利達501.92億元，淨利率60.8%，每股盈餘（EPS）為14.66元。

累計今年上半年，南亞科稅後淨利為762.5億元，每股盈餘達23.38元，截至6月底每股淨值為93.49元。

南亞科總經理李培瑛表示，今年上半年應用於AI基礎設施及伺服器的產品營收占比已超過20%。目前公司持續供應DDR5、LPDDR5/5X、DDR4等多元產品，並積極拓展客製化AI/WoW及AI基礎設施等高附加價值產品。

在產能布局與研發進度方面，南亞科規劃新廠第一階段將於2028年達到每月投片3萬片，全產能規劃為4.5萬片，預估資本支出約4800億元。同時，第三代、第四代、第五代10奈米級製程（1C/1D/1E）以及EUV的研發工作，目前皆依既定計畫持續推進。

記憶體供給吃緊將延續數季

李培瑛強調，各家供應商正積極擴充產能並調整產品組合，以提升高利潤產品的比重。南亞科的新產能規劃也將依據客戶的長期供貨合約（LTA）需求，自2028年起逐步擴增。

在需求端，AI GPU、CPU及ASIC持續帶動HBM、LPDDR5及DDR5需求大幅成長。AI基礎建設也推升eSSD、SmartNIC與BMC採用更高容量、更高效能的DRAM，以因應高速資料處理、網路傳輸及系統管理需求。此外，非AI應用的產能受到限制，也有助於高階產品發展及終端產品價格調整。南亞科認為，AI將持續擴大記憶體需求缺口，並推動產業朝多元AI應用發展。

展望後市，南亞科指出，AI需求的快速成長正在改變全球記憶體的供需結構。雲端資料中心AI伺服器及一般伺服器對HBM與RDIMM需求持續擴張，進而排擠了手機、PC、車用及消費性DRAM的供給。預期記憶體供給不足的情況將延續數季以上，客戶也已開始透過長期供貨合約建立供需共識。

news.Title: 南亞科第2季每股賺14.66元創新高　下半年價格續漲
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年07月10日電）動態隨機存取記憶體（DRAM）廠南亞科 (2408) 第2季受惠產品平均售價上揚逾60%，毛利率攀高至79.5%，稅後淨利突破500億元，每股純益14.66元，創下歷史新高。南亞科總經理李培瑛表示，下半年售價可望持續揚升，毛利率將更高。

南亞科今天召開線上法人說明會，公布第2季營運結果。第2季營收新台幣825.49億元，季增68.2%，銷售量較第1季持平，主要受惠平均售價上揚超過60%。

南亞科第2季毛利率達到79.5%，較第1季揚升11.6個百分點，稅後淨利501.92億元，每股純益14.66元，創下歷史新高；累計上半年稅後淨利762.5億元，每股純益23.38元，每股淨值93.49元。

李培瑛表示，上半年應用於AI基礎設施及伺服器的產品營收占總營收比重已超過20%，亦持續供應DDR5、LPDDR5、DDR4等產品，其中，DDR5產品營收比重約1成，LPDDR5產品預計下半年進行驗證。

李培瑛指出，AI晶片龍頭廠輝達（NVIDIA）是南亞科多年客戶，此外，Google、微軟（Microsoft）、英特爾（Intel）和超微（AMD）也都是南亞科客戶，除參與私募的客戶外，南亞科未來還會增加長約客戶。

展望後市，李培瑛說，產業結構性轉變，擴大需求缺口，預期記憶體供給不足可能維持一段時間，長期數年合約形成供需共識。南亞科目前長約比重達50%，未來短期合約到期後，將轉為長約。

李培瑛表示，南亞科近期出貨量將持平，待新廠開始產出後，出貨量才可望增加，下半年產品售價將持續揚升，毛利率也將進一步攀升。

至於韓國兩大記憶體廠三星（Samsung）和SK海力士（hynix）投資擴產，李培瑛說，根據兩家廠商產能增加計畫估算，產能增幅合理。

至於新廠進度，李培瑛表示，第一階段產能規劃於2028年達到每月投片量3萬片，2029年達到3.6萬片，全產能4.5萬片，總資本支出將達4800億元，目前已支付不到1000億元，其餘金額將以現有資金支應，並無強烈募資需求，不過，不排除考慮籌資。

李培瑛說，南亞科會持續擴大人員招募，新廠估計需要1500人，已招募一半人員，要再招募另一半人員，此外，未來也會規劃招募後段測試封裝人員。

news.Title: nLight (LASR) Moves 27.3% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
news.Content:
nLight LASR shares soared 27.3% in the last trading session to close at $74.71. The move was backed by solid volume with far more shares changing hands than in a normal session. This compares to the stock's 6.4% loss over the past four weeks.

The optimism surrounding the stock can be attributed to nLIGHT securing a Joint Laser Weapon System contract with a total potential value of up to $627 million from the U.S. Department of War. The company received an initial award of $44 million and will develop high-energy laser weapon systems for next-generation cruise missile defense, strengthening its position in the growing directed energy market.

This laser maker is expected to post quarterly earnings of $0.14 per share in its upcoming report, which represents a year-over-year change of +133.3%. Revenues are expected to be $78.52 million, up 27.2% from the year-ago quarter.

Earnings and revenue growth expectations certainly give a good sense of the potential strength in a stock, but empirical research shows that trends in earnings estimate revisions are strongly correlated with near-term stock price movements.

For nLight, the consensus EPS estimate for the quarter has remained unchanged over the last 30 days. And a stock's price usually doesn't keep moving higher in the absence of any trend in earnings estimate revisions. So, make sure to keep an eye on LASR going forward to see if this recent jump can turn into more strength down the road.

news.Title: 南亞科第二季ASP季增逾60%，EPS達14.66元
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-10 14:25:03 周佩宇 發佈

南亞科(2408)今(10)日公佈第二季自行結算合併財務報告。公司第二季營業收入為825億4千9百萬元、季增68.2%，其中第二季DRAM平均售價季增超過六十位數百分比、銷售量季持平；營業毛利為656.19億元，毛利率79.5%、季增11.6個百分點；營業淨利為608.26億元，營益率73.7%、季增12.4個百分點；營業外收入15.03億元，稅後淨利為501.92億元、淨利率60.8%，EPS為14.66元 。累計上半年稅後淨利達762.5億元，EPS 23.38元 。所有合併財務數字為公司自結，尚未經會計師核閱。

公司上半年應用於AI基礎設施及伺服器的產品營收占比已超過20%，同時亦持續供應DDR5、LPDDR5/5X、DDR4、LPDDR4/4X、DDR3及LPDDR3產品，以滿足多元市場需求。

此外，公司將持續拓展客製化AI/WoW與AI基礎設施等高附加價值產品；新廠第一階段產能規劃於2028年達每月投片量3萬片，預估全產能4.5萬片資本支出將達4,800億元；第三代、第四代、第五代10奈米級製程(1C/1D/1E)及EUV等研發工作，均按原定計畫順利進行。在永續方面，公司已連續第五年入選DJBIC世界指數，並連續第七年入選為S&P全球永續年鑑成員，榮獲國際永續評鑑機構的肯定。

南亞科長約已佔五成；加速新製程及新廠布局

應廣因漲價預期提前拉貨效應，H1超預期成長

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 巴威來襲台股休市！美、日、韓股全狂飆 投資人「1天少賺6萬」
news.Content:
強烈颱風巴威來襲，北北基等多縣市昨（9）日晚間宣布今（10）日停班停課，台股也同步休市一天。然而，原本期待迎接反彈行情的投資人卻意外「看得到、吃不到」，因為美股昨夜強勢收紅，費城半導體指數大漲逾3%，帶動日韓股市今早開盤同步飆升，讓不少股民感嘆「虧大了」。

美股昨日全面走強，半導體族群成為最大亮點，費城半導體指數勁揚約3%，激勵亞洲股市買氣。今（10）日上午9點35分左右，日股大漲約2.2%、韓股更強彈約4.6%，市場原本預期台股有機會跟隨國際股市反攻，但因颱風假休市，投資人只能隔岸觀望。

根據市場估算，若台股今日同步上漲約2.2%，加權指數市值可能增加約1.51兆元；扣除外資持股後，台股1448萬名開戶投資人平均資產有機會增加約6萬元，讓不少股民直呼「少賺一天」。

此外，台股近期日成交量維持逾兆元水準，若正常交易，政府證交稅單日收入估計至少可達20億元。原定今日也有中信金、聯詠等20多檔股票除權息，若搭上反彈行情，可能有機會快速完成填權息，但因休市順延，也增加市場不確定性。

更讓投資人扼腕的是，台指期夜盤在颱風假前強勢上漲，一度大漲約800點，最高突破4萬6000點，讓不少持有多單的股民感到錯失行情。

有網友在社群平台抱怨：「睡前看一眼，台指期夜盤漲了800點，市長ㄚ你宣布放颱風假是要我在家玩撿紅點嗎」；也有人怒喊：「台指期夜盤漲八百點，預報颱風禮拜五也不會來結果就放颱風假，白白浪費一個交易日，根本就是選舉假」。還有人看戲「好好笑，笑到哭」、「你就看到明天台北市一堆人逛百貨，蔣萬安造成股市蒸發百億」；但也有網友提醒，「但常常夜盤大漲，台股大跌，怎麼都沒人出來說」、「所以股市休市一天害你損失幾億了？」、「講的好像自己一天能賺多少一樣」。

（封面圖／AI示意圖）

news.Title: 南韓下周或將升息引爆「半導體悖論」！外資逃、槓桿ETF反噬、技術性熊市 韓股還扛得住嗎？
news.Content:
南韓央行 (BOK) 下周四 (16 日) 將宣布最新利率決議，市場普遍預估將升息 1 碼至 2.75%，為 2021 年 8 月來首次緊縮，而由於時值韓股從 6 月高點已下跌逾兩成進入技術性熊市，加上外資上半年淨賣超 148 兆韓元與槓桿 ETF 引發再平衡賣壓，BOK 啟動緊縮週期也讓使南韓資本市場面臨嚴峻考驗。

BOK 總裁申鉉松周四 (9 日) 在南韓國會被議員質詢時明確表態，綜合通膨超標、經濟成長改善與金融穩定風險上升三因素，「需要在合適時機上調基準利率」。

數據顯示，南韓 6 月消費者物價指數 (CPI) 年增 3.2%，遠超央行 2% 目標，生活物價指數漲幅更高達 3.4％。對此申鉉松表示，今年上半年通膨受中東地緣推升油價屬供給側衝擊，但驅動力正出現結構性轉變，三星電子、SK 海力士發放巨額績效獎金及 KOSPI 大漲帶動居民資產擴張，「物價上漲率料將在相當長一段時間內維持高位」，即便能源價格回落，需求側消費推力仍將支撐通膨。

花旗經濟學家 Jin-Wook Kim 預期下周四升息 1 碼後，BOK 在 10 月將再升息一次，2027 年 1 月與 4 月各追加一次，開啟漸進式緊縮循環。此一路徑意味本次升息非孤立事件，對於已承壓股市將持續構成估值向下重評價壓力。

專家指出，南韓市場正陷入三重危機外資出逃、槓桿 ETF、指數集中度風險同步發酵的困境。

KOSPI 近日持續大幅震盪，多次觸發熔斷機制，外資為首要賣壓來源。今年上半年淨賣出 148 兆韓元，近期每日淨賣超逾 1.3 兆韓元且集中拋售三星電子與 SK 海力士。韓元兌美元匯率亦從今年初約 1200 貶至 1566 的 16 年新低，令美元計價獲利了結誘因加劇。

第二重風險來自單股 2 倍槓桿 ETF。追蹤三星與 SK 海力士的 14 檔個股槓桿 ETF 於 5 月底掛牌，周二 (7 日) 全線重挫 12-13%，13 檔跌破 2 萬韓元發行價，當日 16 檔個股槓桿及反向 ETF 合計成交額達 13.1 兆韓元，佔全市場 ETF 成交逾三分之一。

由於每日再平衡需買賣正股對沖，在股價下跌時觸發「加碼賣正股」機制，放大三星與海力士的賣壓。

最令市場困惑的是基本面與股價深度背離，三星電子 Q2 營業利益達 8.94 兆韓元，SK 海力士同期亦繳出強勁獲利，但兩檔指標股卻領跌大盤，這種「巨頭業績狂飆反遭血洗」被分析師稱為「半導體悖論」。

全球 AI 基礎建設投資使半導體景氣上行，但緊縮預期、匯率貶值、槓桿產品結構性賣壓同步碾壓本地股價。

南韓政府設有約 10 兆韓元股市穩定基金，相對外資上半年賣超規模懸殊。

南韓副總理具潤哲表示，相關部門正討論降低波動措施，金管會亦評估收緊槓桿 ETF 交易要求，惟尚未拍板。

BOK 下周升息已是市場共識，真正變數在於緊縮循環啟動後韓元能否企穩、外資賣壓何時止、槓桿 ETF 會否引發連鎖平倉，這三個問題的答案將決定韓股是從熊市找尋支撐，或進一步測試下限。

news.Title: Why Arm Holdings Stock Soared 224.4% Through The First Half Of 2026
news.Content:
Shares of Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM) rocketed 224.4% higher in the first half of 2026, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . The computer chip design and licensing firm is poised to benefit greatly from the next phase of the artificial intelligence ( AI ) boom, driving investor demand for the stock. It is now the 40th-largest company in the world by market cap, valued at $350 billion as of the close on July 9th, 2026.

Here's why Arm Holdings stock has boomed so far in 2026, and whether you should consider buying right now.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Embracing the future with AI

In the global computer chip supply chain, there is perhaps no greater gap between a company's importance and general awareness than that of Arm Holdings. It designs and licenses chip architectures for central processing units (CPUs) and has built a reputation for energy-efficient smartphone architectures, which is why Apple uses Arm for all of its internal chips.

Now, its CPU architecture is expanding rapidly into a new market: AI. Many AI infrastructure players, such as Meta Platforms and Amazon , have used Arm to design internal CPUs for data centers. It has even designed its own computer chip, the AGI CPU, an energy-efficient CPU that could arrive at the exact right moment as the power bottleneck in AI data centers grows and grows.

Arm's revenue was $4.92 billion in 2026, driven by its royalty and licensing revenue for CPU designs. By 2031, Arm projects it will generate $25 billion in revenue, driven almost entirely by the growth of its new AGI CPU. Direct sales from the chip are expected to be $15 billion five years from now.

Should you buy Arm Holdings stock?

The potential for growth at Arm is salivating. It could see a 5x increase in revenue over the next five years, if management's guidance is taken at face value. Investors are anticipating this growth, which has driven up the stock so far in 2026. Arm Holdings is officially a new thematic winner for the AI boom.

That doesn't mean you need to pile into the stock today. Arm management is projecting it will generate $9 in earnings per share ( EPS ) in 2031. Compared to the current stock price of $334, that would give it a price-to-earnings ratio (P/E) of over 36 five years from now, assuming the company can achieve these aggressive growth targets. At this stock price, investors would do best to avoid buying Arm stock.

Story Continues

news.Title: Analog Devices (ADI) Surpasses Market Returns: Some Facts Worth Knowing
news.Content:
In the latest trading session, Analog Devices (ADI) closed at $393.64, marking a +2.14% move from the previous day. The stock exceeded the S&P 500, which registered a gain of 0.81% for the day. At the same time, the Dow added 0.27%, and the tech-heavy Nasdaq gained 1.3%.

Shares of the semiconductor maker have depreciated by 1.85% over the course of the past month, underperforming the Computer and Technology sector's loss of 1.59%, and the S&P 500's gain of 1.13%.

Investors will be eagerly watching for the performance of Analog Devices in its upcoming earnings disclosure. It is anticipated that the company will report an EPS of $3.33, marking a 62.44% rise compared to the same quarter of the previous year. Simultaneously, our latest consensus estimate expects the revenue to be $3.93 billion, showing a 36.28% escalation compared to the year-ago quarter.

For the annual period, the Zacks Consensus Estimates anticipate earnings of $12.41 per share and a revenue of $14.58 billion, signifying shifts of +59.31% and +32.29%, respectively, from the last year.

Investors might also notice recent changes to analyst estimates for Analog Devices. These latest adjustments often mirror the shifting dynamics of short-term business patterns. Therefore, positive revisions in estimates convey analysts' confidence in the business performance and profit potential.

Our research demonstrates that these adjustments in estimates directly associate with imminent stock price performance. To exploit this, we've formed the Zacks Rank, a quantitative model that includes these estimate changes and presents a viable rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, stretching from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), has a noteworthy track record of outperforming, validated by third-party audits, with stocks rated #1 producing an average annual return of +25% since the year 1988. Within the past 30 days, our consensus EPS projection remained stagnant. Analog Devices is currently sporting a Zacks Rank of #1 (Strong Buy).

In terms of valuation, Analog Devices is presently being traded at a Forward P/E ratio of 31.05. For comparison, its industry has an average Forward P/E of 48.47, which means Analog Devices is trading at a discount to the group.

We can additionally observe that ADI currently boasts a PEG ratio of 1.08. This popular metric is similar to the widely-known P/E ratio, with the difference being that the PEG ratio also takes into account the company's expected earnings growth rate. The average PEG ratio for the Semiconductor - Analog and Mixed industry stood at 1.01 at the close of the market yesterday.

Story Continues

The Semiconductor - Analog and Mixed industry is part of the Computer and Technology sector. At present, this industry carries a Zacks Industry Rank of 17, placing it within the top 7% of over 250 industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank assesses the strength of our separate industry groups by calculating the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks contained within the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Remember to apply Zacks.com to follow these and more stock-moving metrics during the upcoming trading sessions.

news.Title: Tower Semiconductor (TSEM) Advances AI Data Center Connectivity With Photonics Milestone
news.Content:
Tower Semiconductor Ltd. (NASDAQ: TSEM ) is one of the top stocks to buy according to Whale Rock Capital Management . On June 18, Tower Semiconductor Ltd. (NASDAQ:TSEM) announced that it has shipped more than five million coherent photonic integrated circuits (PICs) to global customers of its partner Marvell Technology.

These chips are used in coherent optical transceivers, which are specialized components that transmit data over fiber optic cables. According to Tower, these components are increasingly needed to link data centers as AI computing drives up demand for network bandwidth and speed. It added that coherent PICs are harder to build than simpler chip types because they must precisely control both the phase and polarization of light. Tower has been working with Marvell to push this technology forward, including combining silicon with other specialized materials, stacking electronic components in three dimensions, and using an advanced packaging method known as V-Grooves to improve how light is guided through the chip.

Dr. Ed Preisler, who leads Tower's RF Business Unit, said the company's photonics manufacturing platforms need to keep evolving alongside the requirements of coherent optical transceivers, and that Tower is proud of its partnership with Marvell in this area.

For Dr. Radha Nagarajan, Marvell's chief technology officer for optical engineering, the shipment is a milestone that proves the strength of the two companies' collaboration. Nagarajan added that Marvell intends to keep working with Tower to develop next-generation coherent technology suited to large-scale data center networks.

Tower Semiconductor Ltd. (NASDAQ:TSEM) is a specialized semiconductor foundry. It provides technology, development, and process platforms for integrated circuits, including SiPho, SiGe, CMOS image sensor, RF CMOS, mixed signal CMOS, non-imaging sensors, and integrated power management technologies.

While we acknowledge the potential of TSEM as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. news.Title: 三星、SK海力士加槓桿ETF吃掉七成交易 韓股從全球最強墜入熊市
news.Content:
曾是全球表現最強勁的資本市場之一，韓國股市如今卻陷入結構性危機。三星電子、SK 海力士，加上近期掛牌的追蹤型槓桿 ETF，三者合計占據市場逾七成交易額，交易高度集中，使股市波動風險急遽升高，也讓投資人對市場穩定性與流動性憂慮升溫。

根據最新市場統計，南韓綜合指數 ( KOSPI ) 已正式跌入技術性熊市，較 6 月份的歷史高點累計回調幅度超過 20%。

市場的脆弱性在交易機制上暴露無遺，今年以來，韓國股市已累計觸發 6 次全市場交易暫停機制（熔斷），這一數字竟佔據了自 2000 年以來歷史總發生次數的一半。

這場風暴的源頭，可以追溯到 5 月下旬多檔個股槓桿 ETF 的上市。

在這些產品推出之前，三星與 SK 海力士的成交量已佔全市場的三成；隨著槓桿 ETF 交易額的併入，集中度迅速惡化，在 6 月下旬數據甚至一度攀升至 84%，近期雖略有回落，但仍長期維持在 73% 以上的異常水平。

韓國金融監管機構對此公開表示遺憾，承認相關產品帶來了顯著的負面副作用，甚至引發了政界對於強制除牌相關 ETF 的呼聲。

槓桿機制下的波動惡性循環

這場由零售投資者主導的槓桿押注，最初是為了乘勢追擊晶片股的史詩級漲勢。年初時，三星與 SK 海力士的股價曾大幅攀升，較年初漲幅超過兩倍，吸引大量散戶前仆後繼投入。

然而，隨著全球市場對人工智能（AI）領域重資本投入的可持續性產生疑慮，供應鏈的每一個微小動態，都成為左右股價的關鍵因素。

槓桿 ETF 的運作機制，反而成為了放大恐慌的催化劑。富達國際投資組合經理 Ian Samson 指出，為了維持恒定的槓桿比率，基金經理必須在股價上漲時買入、下跌時賣出，這種強制性的每日再平衡操作，直接導致了市場波動的自我強化。

這種機械式的反饋循環，將晶片行業本身的基本面不確定性，進一步疊加放大，導致單日超過 5% 的異常波動變得愈發常見。

監管進退兩難 市場廣度遭壓制

里昂證券韓國分部的分析指出，資金的高度集中嚴重壓制了更廣泛的市場廣度與投資情緒。

儘管部分分析師傾向於將當前的回調視為牛市過程中的調整，而非系統性崩潰的序幕，但現實卻是韓國股市對這兩家晶片公司的依賴已達到了極致，三星與 SK 海力士合計佔據了 KOSPI 基準指數 54% 的權重。

當初監管機構批准這些槓桿產品上市，其初衷是希望引導更多零售資金回流本土市場，並透過增加流動性來支撐疲軟的韓元。

然而，事與願違，這些政策工具反而成為了市場不穩定的核心源頭。

news.Title: Can SIMO Benefit From the Rising Enterprise Storage Demand?
news.Content:
Silicon Motion Technology Corporation SIMO is a leading provider of NAND flash controllers and has expanded its footprint in the enterprise storage market with advanced Solid-State Drive (SSD) controller solutions. The company develops controller technology that enables storage vendors to build high-performance enterprise SSDs for servers, cloud platforms and hyperscale data centers.

Silicon Motion's enterprise storage portfolio is led by its MonTitan enterprise SSD controller platform. Designed for hyperscale data centers, cloud infrastructure and AI applications, the platform supports PCIe Gen5 and NVMe technologies, delivering high capacity, low latency and high input/output operations per second (IOPS). It incorporates advanced security, data protection and error correction features to improve the reliability and performance of enterprise SSDs.

The company also develops enterprise firmware and reference design kits that help SSD manufacturers reduce development time and accelerate product launches. Its controller-focused business model enables collaboration with multiple NAND flash suppliers and storage vendors, delivering flexible controller solutions that can be integrated into a wide range of enterprise SSDs.

With its next-generation enterprise SSD controller platform, Silicon Motion is well-positioned to benefit from the growing demand for AI, cloud computing and enterprise storage infrastructure.

How Are Competitors Advancing in the Enterprise Storage Market?

Silicon Motion faces competition from Seagate Technology Holdings plc STX and Micron Technology, Inc. MU. Seagate is expanding its enterprise storage business to support the growing demand from AI and cloud data centers. The company is advancing its Mozaic platform to increase storage density, improve power efficiency and lower data center operating costs. Seagate is expanding the deployment of HAMR-based Exos hard drives to help enterprise customers store more data within the same data center footprint.

Micron introduced high-capacity SSDs to help enterprise customers store more data while reducing power and space requirements. The company continues to expand its enterprise SSD portfolio with high-performance drives based on its latest NAND technology. Micron is enhancing SSD performance and power efficiency to meet the growing storage demands of AI, cloud and enterprise data centers.

SIMO's Price Performance, Valuation and Estimates

Silicon Motion shares have skyrocketed 319.4% over the past year compared with the industry's growth of 218.8%.

Story Continues

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

Going by the price/earnings ratio, the company's shares currently trade at 31.61 forward earnings, higher than 13.5 for the industry.

Earnings estimates for 2026 have increased 1.3% to $8.48 over the past 60 days, while those for 2027 have also increased 4% to $10.87.

Silicon Motion stock currently sports a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). You can see the complete list of today's Zacks #1 Rank stocks here .

news.Title: Can Vicor's Licensing Royalties Strengthen Long-Term Growth?
news.Content:
Vicor Corporation VICR is strengthening its long-term growth strategy by expanding its intellectual property licensing business, creating an additional avenue to monetize its proprietary power conversion technologies beyond direct product sales. As AI infrastructure providers, hyperscalers and semiconductor companies adopt increasingly complex power architectures, demand for advanced power delivery solutions continues to build. This positions Vicor to generate recurring royalty income by licensing its patented technologies to a broader customer base while reinforcing its competitive standing in power electronics.

Licensing has the potential to become an increasingly meaningful contributor to Vicor's financial profile. Royalty income requires limited incremental manufacturing investment, allowing the company to leverage decades of research and development across a wider ecosystem. VICR continues to invest in expanding its licensing practice and protecting its intellectual property through patent enforcement, a discipline that should support broader adoption of its technologies over time. The approach also gives customers a path to access Vicor's innovations through licensing agreements, creating a scalable, high-margin revenue stream that complements the company's core hardware business.

The opportunity is reinforced by next-generation AI processors requiring increasingly sophisticated power delivery architectures. Vicor expects licensing to work alongside its product portfolio, benefiting whether customers purchase its power modules directly or license its proprietary technologies, a dual revenue model that could diversify revenue sources and improve long-term earnings quality as adoption expands across AI, hyperscale computing and other high-performance applications.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Vicor's 2026 revenues is pegged at $594.05 million, indicating 31.22% year-over-year growth, pointing to expectations that this licensing-driven expansion will increasingly factor into the company's broader growth trajectory ahead, supporting a more durable and diversified earnings base over the long term.

VICR Faces Stiff Competition

Vicor faces stiff competition from Monolithic Power Systems MPWR and Analog Devices ADI. Monolithic Power Systems continues to expand its power management portfolio for AI, cloud computing and industrial applications through highly integrated semiconductor solutions. Analog Devices leverages its broad analog and power management portfolio to address data center, communications and automotive demand.

Monolithic Power Systems continues investing in innovation to strengthen its competitive position, while Analog Devices is expanding advanced power solutions for next-generation computing platforms. Although Monolithic Power Systems and Analog Devices compete across similar end markets, Vicor's expanding intellectual property licensing strategy provides an additional avenue for long-term value creation.

Story Continues

VICR's Price Performance, Valuation & Estimates

Vicor Corporation shares have surged 140.1% year to date, outperforming the Zacks Electronic Miscellaneous Components industry's decline of 15.1% and the broader Computer and Technology sector's appreciation of 14.7%.

news.Title: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From Monolithic Power Systems' Report
news.Content:
Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (MPWR), headquartered in Kirkland, Washington, designs, develops, markets, and sells semiconductor-based power electronics solutions for the storage and computing, automotive, enterprise data, consumer, communications, and industrial markets. With a market cap of $62.5 billion, the company offers power management IC, isolated gate drivers, power modules, battery and chargers, load switches, inductors, analog input devices, sensors, motor drivers and controllers, and electronic components. The analog and mixed-signal chipmaker is expected to announce its fiscal second-quarter earnings for 2026 in the near term.

Ahead of the event, analysts expect MPWR to report a profit of $4.83 per share on a diluted basis, up 63.7% from $2.95 per share in the year-ago quarter. The company beat the consensus estimates in two of the last four quarters while missing the forecast on two other occasions.

More News from Barchart

SpaceX Has Massive Multiyear Put Options Volume As SPCX Falls Below IPO Price

Jeff Bezos Says 'We Don't Have a Revenue Problem' in America — Bottom Half Paying Just 3% of Taxes Means 'We Can Find 3%'

Intel Stock Is 'Too Good to Ignore' as HSBC Sets a New Street-High Price Target

Our exclusive Barchart Brief newsletter is your FREE midday guide to what's moving stocks, sectors, and investor sentiment - delivered right when you need the info most. Subscribe today!

For the full year, analysts expect MPWR to report EPS of $20.13, up 57.4% from $12.79 in fiscal 2025. Its EPS is expected to rise 23.5% year over year to $24.85 in fiscal 2027.

MPWR stock has outperformed the S&P 500 Index's ($SPX) 20.2% gains over the past 52 weeks, with shares up 72.8% during this period. Similarly, it outperformed the State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF's (XLK) 41.6% gains over the same time frame.

MPWR beat on AI and data center strength. Enterprise data and communications led growth, as optical module/switch demand rose 33% sequentially while server/AI orders continued to ramp. Due to that, management raised enterprise data growth guidance to 85% year over year and increased manufacturing capacity to $6 billion. In addition, new product ramps in DDR5, robotics, and auto provide further upside. That said, near-term caution remains around notebooks and inventory, though the company is still well positioned to capture AI infrastructure demand.

Analysts' consensus opinion on MPWR stock is bullish, with a "Strong Buy" rating overall. Out of 15 analysts covering the stock, 12 advise a "Strong Buy" rating, two suggest a "Moderate Buy," and one gives a "Hold." MPWR's average analyst price target is $1,812.15, indicating a notable potential upside of 37.8% from the current levels.

news.Title: 小資族瘋"定期定額" 台積電22萬戶蟬聯霸主
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者林浩宇

定期定額已成為不少小資族布局台股的重要方式，證交所公布最新6月定期定額交易排行榜，台積電持續穩坐人氣王，交易戶數突破22萬戶，再創新高；聯發科、日月光等半導體族群排名也大躍進，聯發科6月交易戶數，更是比5月份倍增；反觀部分金融股交易戶數則出現下滑，顯示定期定額資金正跟著產業趨勢移動，也讓最新排行榜成為觀察市場資金流向的重要風向球。

民眾：「個股的部分，應該還是台積電吧，因為大家就是一直想要買台積電，然後看它能不能一飛沖天。」

民眾：「台積電、台達電、聯發科。」

如果只能選一檔股票定期定額，不少民眾的答案都是台積電，證交所公布6月定期定額交易排行榜，護國神山台積電沒有懸念蟬聯第一名，交易戶數更是第二名玉山金的八倍，鴻海則擠下兆豐金排名第三，中信金緊追在後，AI概念股穩坐投資人布局焦點。

顧德投顧分析師 黃紫東：「現在他們只是蹲得比較低，未來如果產能開出來，股價還是有持續墊高的空間，所以整體而言，台積電畢竟是我們權王，投資朋友要求安定跟成長性，兩個條件並肩的情況之下，選擇台積電是一個正確的決定。」

排行榜亮點不少，台積電依然穩坐霸主地位，6月的交易戶數比起5月增加超過2萬戶，總交易戶數突破22萬戶，創下新高紀錄；而聯發科從5月的第18名，一口氣躍升第12名，交易戶數增加6千多戶，月增幅高達143.9%，成為本月進步幅度最大的個股；日月光則首度擠進排行榜，並將中鋼擠出前20名。

顧德投顧分析師 黃紫東：「大家的定期定額選股方向稍微有點轉變，反而是表示了，目前為止買股是全民運動，在全民運動的情況之下，其實投資朋友也是越來越精明，越來越懂得精打細算，甚至選到對的產業。」

相較於AI族群熱度持續升溫，金融股人氣卻出現降溫，前20大定期定額排行榜中，金融股雖仍有11檔上榜，占比超過一半，但已有6檔交易戶數不增反減。其中，合庫金月減6.01%最多，玉山金、兆豐金、第一金減幅也超過4%。反映出定期定額資金布局，正逐步由傳統的金融股，轉向AI供應鏈核心概念股。當資金持續輪動，排行榜下一匹黑馬市場充滿想像。（記者 林浩宇、謝隆証／台北採訪報導）

news.Title: 外資賣超471億元連6賣 減碼傳產股
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年07月9日電）台股今天盤中區間震盪，尾盤台積電股價下拉收在全日最低點，集中市場指數終場下跌379.80點，收45354.61點，成交值約新台幣9443.41億元。其中，外資賣超471億元，賣超前3名分別為中石化、台泥、台化，皆為傳產股。

根據台灣證券交易所統計，今天三大法人合計賣超393.93億元。外資及陸資（不含外資自營商）賣超471.32億元，為連續第6個交易日賣超，自營商賣超76.71億元；僅投信站在買方，買超154.10億元。

個股方面，外資單日賣超前3名為中石化 (1314) 4萬3162張、台泥 (1101) 2萬9874張，和台化 (1326) 2萬3859張，皆為傳產股。台積電 (2330) 居賣超榜第10名，遭外資減碼1萬2748張。

買超榜方面，外資單日買超前3名分別為友達 (2409) 18萬8929張、主動統一升級50（00403A）3萬4040張，和長榮航 (2618) 3萬3990張。

群益投顧研究部副總裁曾炎裕分析，台股與韓股是這波AI浪潮下主要受惠的股市，尤其今年以來韓股漲勢凶猛，已成為全球科技股的重要多空指標，台股也會受到牽動。本週五SK海力士的美國存託憑證（ADR）將在美國那斯達克掛牌，目前傳出超額認購7倍，有望改寫外國企業赴美IPO規模紀錄，SK海力士ADR掛牌後的表現將影響台股後勢。

至於美國總統川普表示，與伊朗之間的停火協議「已經結束」，造成中東情勢再度緊張，曾炎裕認為對台股影響有限，他舉與美伊戰爭最相關的國際油價走勢來看，今年3月剛開戰時，國際油價衝上高點，之後各種消息反覆，但油價沒有再過高，顯示影響逐漸淡化。

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指漲1.65%重返4000點；科創50大漲8.41%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-09 17:21:01 數位內容中心 發佈

中國A股今(9)日走揚，科技成長股領軍反彈，午後半導體與算力硬體帶動指數快速走揚，市場情緒回暖。上證指數重返4000點、收於4,036.59點，上漲1.65%，日K翻紅；深證成指收於15,398.73點，上漲3.07%；創業板指收於4,018.17點，上漲4.49%；科創50指數收於2,185.83點，大漲8.41%，成為盤面最強主軸。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆3,642億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆5,496億元，兩市成交額2兆9,138億元，較前一交易日量增約13%。資金快速回流科技與半導體相關方向，科創板與算力硬體概念成為成交熱點，風險偏好同步升溫。

從盤面上來看，半導體材料、半導體設備、記憶體晶片、晶圓產業、先進封裝與GPU概念同步走強；算力硬體與AI伺服器族群延續強勢，市場對AI算力供給偏緊與相關業績成長的預期升溫，成為資金聚焦重點。

《陸股》滬指跌0.49%、日K連三黑；科創50漲0.73%

news.Title: 世界先進6月營收創歷史新高　力積電登47個月高點
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年7月9日電）晶圓代工廠世界先進 (5347) 及力積電 (6770) 6月營收同步攀高，其中，世界先進營收攀高至新台幣59.77億元，創下歷史新高；力積電營收達64.74億元，為47個月來新高水準。

世界先進自結6月營收59.77億元，月增40.89%，年增33.57%。世界先進表示，晶圓出貨量增加，推升6月營收創高。

世界先進第2季營收142.45億元，表現符合預期，季增13.67%。世界先進預期，第2季晶圓出貨量季增11%至13%，產品平均售價季增2%至4%。

世界先進累計上半年營收267.76億元，年增13.23%。世界先進先前指出，因為長期布局，在AI也有很好切入，今年8吋晶圓代工供不應求，客戶需求超乎預期，預估後續需求仍會維持穩健。

力積電自結6月營收64.74億元，月增12.19%，年增68.75%。力積電表示，6月營收攀高主要受惠客戶需求上升，銷售量增加，價格調漲。

力積電第2季營收172.9億元，季增27.39%；累計上半年營收308.63億元，較去年同期增加37.81%。（編輯：張良知）

news.Title: 《韓股》半導體回穩，KOSPI收漲0.62%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-09 16:39:17 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(9)日同步反彈。韓國KOSPI指數終場收於7,291.91點，上漲45.12點或0.62%；韓國KOSDAQ指數收於794.00點，上漲9.00點或1.15%。市場在前一交易日大幅回檔後出現低接買盤，半導體族群回穩成為主軸，帶動指數於盤中震盪後收復失地；韓國銀行對國內股市趨勢性下跌的看法相對保留，也為盤勢提供一定支撐。

KOSPI指數方面，指數反彈核心仍集中在大型權值股，SK Hynix(000660.KS)漲5.30%，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)漲0.18%，Samsung Electro-Mechanics(009150.KS)漲0.95%，帶動電子與半導體相關族群回升。相對地，市場廣度仍偏弱，收盤時下跌家數多於上漲家數，顯示這波反彈主要由少數大型股拉動。

同時，金融與傳產族群則呈現走勢分歧。除半導體外，KB Financial Group(105560.KS)漲0.23%，但Samsung Life Insurance(032830.KS)跌5.78%，Samsung C&T(028260.KS)跌4.18%，Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)跌3.68%，LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)跌0.63%，使得其他權值股未能形成一致支撐。盤面結構顯示，資金仍偏向先前跌幅較深、估值修正較多的族群，整體買盤並未全面擴散。

news.Title: 〈陸股盤後〉中國6月CPI年升1% 市場不甩通膨放緩
news.Content:
中國 A 股三大指數 9 日（周四）走高，中國國家統計局當天發布的數據顯示 ，6 月消費者物價指數（CPI）較一年前上升 1%，隨著伊朗緊張局勢緩和、大宗商品成本回落，CPI 的升幅不如預期。

上證指數 9 日收報 4,036.59 點，漲 1.65%。深證成指收報 15,398.73 點，漲 3.07%。創業板指收報 4,018.17 點，漲 4.49%。

中國 6 月 CPI 年升率放緩至 1%，升幅小於前一個月的 1.2%，也不如經濟學家原估的 1.1%。

其中，城市攀升 1.0%，農村上升 0.8%；食品價格下降 1.6%，非食品價格上漲 1.5%；消費品價格上漲 1.1%，服務價格上漲 0.8%。

6 月 CPI 較前月下降 0.3%。其中，城市下降 0.4%，農村下降 0.3%；食品價格下降 0.4%，非食品價格下降 0.3%；消費品價格下降 0.6%，服務價格持平。

6 月生產者物價指數（PPI）較去年同期上升 4.1%，符合市場預估，但 PPI 較前月下降 0.3%，是 2025 年 7 月以來首度下滑。

國家統計局城市司首席統計師董莉娟表示，6 月受季節性因素、國際市場價格波動等因素影響，CPI 較前月下降 0.3%，扣除食品和能源價格的核心 CPI 年升 1%，寫下今年 1 月以來最小升幅。

news.Title: 三星、SK海力士及其槓桿型ETF 已占韓股成交額逾七成
news.Content:
在規模 4.3 兆美元的南韓股市中，散戶對槓桿型 ETF 的狂熱加劇，正引發嚴重的市場失衡。

最新數據顯示，追蹤南韓兩大晶片巨頭——三星電子與 SK 海力士的槓桿 ETF，連同這兩家公司本身的股票成交額，已占整個南韓股市成交總額的 70% 以上。

這種極端的集中現象在近期顯著惡化。中信里昂證券 (CLSA) 的數據顯示，在今年 5 月底追蹤兩家晶片股兩倍日波幅的槓桿 ETF 上市前一日，三星與海力士的成交額占全部韓股的 31%。然而，隨著產品上市，該比例在 6 月下旬一度飆升至 84%，本周二仍維持在 73% 的高位。

由於三星與海力士在綜合股價指數 (Kospi) 中的權重高達 54%，其波動對大盤具有決定性影響。

受惠於人工智慧 (AI) 浪潮，這兩家晶片商的股價在今年高點曾翻漲逾三倍，吸引散戶湧入槓桿產品以放大收益。然而，隨著市場對大規模 AI 投資產生疑慮，加上晶片股對供應鏈消息極度敏感，槓桿產品的強制性買賣機制進一步放大了波動。

富達國際 (Fidelity International) 經理人 Ian Samson 指出，槓桿 ETF 為了維持恆定槓桿率，必須在股價上漲時買入更多、下跌時賣出更多，這與南韓半導體行業面臨的基本面不確定性相結合，只會導致市場震盪更加劇烈。

此異象已引發外界對監管機構的批評。儘管當初核准這些高風險產品是為了吸引散戶資金留在國內，並減緩韓元貶值，但南韓金融監管機構近期對其負面副作用表示遺憾，甚至有在野黨議員呼籲讓這些 ETF 退市。

目前，Kospi 指數已從 6 月的高點下跌 20%，進入技術性熊市，周三單日更暴跌 5.4%。

儘管中信里昂證券分析師 Jongmin Shim 認為當前僅是牛市中的修正，而非系統性崩潰的開始，但他也坦言，資金過度集中在兩大晶片股及其槓桿產品，確實嚴重削弱了市場廣度與情緒。

news.Title: 《日股》半導體、AI股回神反彈，日經收漲1.38%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-09 16:08:52 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(9)日走揚，日經225指數收於67,743.85點，上漲924.80點或1.38%；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於4,020.37點，上漲13.94點或0.35%。盤勢核心仍是半導體與人工智慧相關買盤回流，帶動指數在前一交易日美國科技股回穩後延續反彈；不過，中東局勢升溫、原油價格與長期利率上行，使盤中漲幅一度收斂。

科技權值股方面，愛德萬測試(6857.JP)、東京威力科創(8035.JP)、Kioxia Holdings(285A.JP)、IBIDEN(4062.JP)、Fujikura(5803.JP)、Lasertec(6920.JP)與Disco(6146.JP)走高，成為推升日經225指數的主要動能。市場資金明顯集中在半導體與AI族群，反映美國科技股與費城半導體指數(SOX)回升後，帶動日股同步出現買盤。

傳產及利率敏感族群方面，Toyota Motor(7203.JP)、Sony Group(6758.JP)、Honda Motor(7267.JP)、Daikin Industries(6367.JP)等個股走弱，拖累汽車、消費及部分景氣循環類股表現。橡膠製品、航空運輸與運輸設備類股同步承壓，顯示油價與利率走揚，對成本敏感族群形成壓力。

news.Title: 《台股盤後》量縮下跌379點，台積遭大單摜壓
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-09 16:00:13 新聞中心 發佈

台股今(9)日受惠費半指數上日重返月線，盤初由明日召開法說會的南亞科強勢表態，加上近兩日弱勢的權值股鴻勁、日月光、欣興、國巨強勢反彈，加權指數一度上漲超過300點、重返46K，可惜權王級台積電、聯發科呈弱勢，其中台積電尾盤更遭大單摜壓，加上國泰金、富邦金轉弱，且19大類股僅貿易百貨、建材營造收紅下，加權指數終場收在45354.61點，下跌379.80點或0.83%，成交量縮至9443.41億元。

美國總統川普稱與伊朗簽署的臨時終戰和平協議已經「玩完」，衝擊道瓊工業平均指數、標準普爾500指數走軟，但博通帶領近來備受打擊的晶片股反彈、費半指數上漲逾2%，重返月線之上。亞洲股市方面，費半指數走揚下，帶動日本AI、半導體相關股漲勢，日經225指數收漲1.38%；韓國KOSPI指數則收漲0.62%。

台股今日震盪走弱、市場氣氛偏向保守，台積電開低走低，終場收在最低點2415元，下跌2.03%，聯電、致茂、聯發科、廣達同步收黑，鴻勁、南電則雙雙攻上漲停，日月光投控勁揚逾8%，智邦、川湖、欣興、奇鋐連袂走揚。被動元件族群成盤面焦點，鈺邦、金山電亮燈漲停，興勤、立隆電、禾伸堂、光頡都走高。記憶體概念股亦表現不俗，南亞科鎖漲停，華邦電、旺宏、廣穎、群聯、威剛、創見紛紛上漲。

29大類股表現方面，今日以綠能環保類股漲勢最強、上漲2.66%，資訊服務與光電類股分別上漲1.65%、1.01%，漲幅分別居第二與第三。弱勢股部分，生技醫療、塑膠、電機機械族群均下跌逾2%，表現相對弱勢。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計賣超393.94億元；其中，外資陸資(不含外資自營商)賣超471.33億元，投信買超154.10億元，自營商賣超76.71億元。

news.Title: KOSPI震盪收漲0.62%終止連三黑，SK海力士勁揚救場，金融股扯後腿
news.Content:
【財訊快報／陳孟朔】連續三天急瀉841.55點或10.4%的韓國首爾綜合股價指數(KOSPI)週四迎來反彈契機，受費城半導體指數止瀉反彈2.2%帶動，指數開盤跳空急彈3.3%，以7,486.64點開出，盤中一度拉高至7,543.86點的日高。不過，午後賣壓再度湧現，指數一度倒吐2.5%，下探7,063.76點日低，終場在DRAM雙雄翻紅支撐下，小漲45.12點或0.62%，收在7,291.91點，為本週首紅，上下震度達480.1點或6%以上。大型科技權值股成為韓股守住紅盤的關鍵。週五即將登陸那斯達克交易所的SK海力士強彈5.3%至218.6萬韓元，成為三十檔大型股(KTOP30)的領頭羊；三星電子也止跌小漲0.18%，使前期遭重砍的AI記憶體與半導體主線出現技術性回補。市場人士指出，韓股早盤受美國半導體股反彈激勵，但午後快速翻黑，顯示投資人對AI資本支出、記憶體報價斜率與槓桿ETF部位出清仍高度敏感。而上日少數活口的大型股樂金電子重挫9.09%，淪為KTOP30最大魯蛇。

盤面壓力則集中在金融與三星集團傳產權值股。三星人壽大跌5.78%，三星火災海上保險重挫7.3%，成為拖累指數的主要個股之一。韓國當地時間9日中午12時36分左右，慶尚北道一處化工冶煉廠發生火災，消防部門於13時10分左右將火災應對級別上調至第二級，當地政府也提醒居民警惕有毒氣體外洩；不過，截至目前，尚無明確資訊顯示這起火警與三星人壽或三星火災海上保險股價重挫存在直接關聯，相關個股下跌仍較可能與市場風險偏好降溫、金融股獲利了結與保險類股估值調整有關。

news.Title: Zacks.com featured highlights include Microchip Technology, Semtech, Texas Instruments, Amtech and Vishay Intertechnology
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – July 9, 2026 – Stocks in this week's article are Microchip Technology MCHP, Semtech SMTC, Texas Instruments TXN, Amtech Systems ASYS and Vishay Intertechnology VSH.

5 Top-Ranked Semiconductor Stocks to Buy for Better Returns in July

Semiconductor stocks have been the primary beneficiaries of the AI boom. As the spending on AI infrastructure development and deployment from leading AI companies, hyperscalers, AI fabs and sovereigns is expected to increase manifold, the prospects for semiconductor companies remain hugely positive.

The semiconductor companies offering compute, scale-out networking, storage, scale-up interconnect, custom AI application-specific integrated circuit chips, optical communication and power delivery chips are benefiting from the huge spending opportunity.

A deeper dive into the physical layer of the AI domain reveals that companies providing high bandwidth memory and advanced packaging are likely to gain tremendously as they remain among the most supply-constrained segments amid the massive demand. Companies building retimers, Compute Express Link, Serializer/Deserializer, optical Digital Signal Processors and Transimpedance Amplifiers are also playing a crucial role.

Similarly, networking and optical connectivity chips represent some of the most structurally expanding opportunities, while power delivery semiconductors and signal-conditioning chips remain relatively overlooked. The global semiconductor sales reached a record $120.6 billion in May 2026, which rose 9.2% sequentially and 104.1% year over year, marking the 15th consecutive month. This is an ideal time to hunt for the most potent and silent winner of the semiconductor arena for July.

Investors looking to benefit from semiconductor companies gaining from the AI boom in July 2026 should consider these stocks: Microchip Technology , Semtech , Texas Instruments , Amtech Systems and Vishay Intertechnology . These stocks have a favorable combination of a Growth Score of A or B and a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) or 2 (Buy). You can see the complete list of today's Zacks #1 Rank stocks here .

Our Picks

Microchip Technology is expanding its presence in AI data center connectivity through PCIe Gen6 switches and retimers, which help move data efficiently among processors, accelerators and other components. The company secured six Gen6 switch design wins ahead of its planned production ramp in the fiscal fourth quarter.

In the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, MCHP's net sales surged 35.1% year over year, while non-GAAP earnings per share (EPS) increased 25.2%. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for fiscal 2027 revenues and EPS suggests a year-over-year increase of approximately 32% and 88%, respectively. The consensus mark for fiscal 2027 earnings has been revised upward over the past 30 days.

news.Title: 韓股跌入熊市，高盛喊轉投中國AI價值鏈，資金輪動升溫
news.Content:
【財訊快報／陳孟朔】韓股AI交易急速退潮，資金輪動焦點轉向中國AI產業鏈。韓國首爾綜合股價指數(KOSPI)週三重挫5.4%，較上月歷史高點回落約20%，正式跌入技術性熊市；此前帶動韓股急漲的兩大權值股同步遭拋售，同步入熊市。高盛主題研究團隊在韓股重挫之際發布報告，建議客戶將倉位從韓國AI交易切換至「中國AI價值鏈」。韓股今年一度為全球表現最強主要股市，KOSPI年內最大漲幅曾高達116%，但在AI資本支出可持續性遭市場質疑後，漲幅已收斂至約72%。三星電子本週公布第二季初報，營業利潤年比暴增19倍，股價仍大跌，顯示投資人關注重點已由當前獲利，轉向AI資本支出熱潮能否延續。市場人士指出，韓國AI行情高度集中於三星電子、SK海力士與相關槓桿ETF，一旦晶片股反轉，散戶槓桿部位與被動再平衡機制容易放大跌幅；外資今年以來也已累計拋售逾1000億美元韓國股票。

資金流向方面，港股科技股接棒成為亞洲市場亮點。韓股暴跌同日，恆生中國企業指數盤中漲幅一度達4.5%，創2025年2月以來最大單日漲幅，阿里巴巴港股漲逾13%，騰訊漲超4%。高盛報告指出，中國AI已正式進入其交易視野，並推薦自建的「GS中國AI價值鏈」股票籃子，涵蓋電力、半導體、AI基礎設施、AI模型與AI應用等全鏈條。該行強調，這不是單純的中國互聯網ETF(KWEB)交易，而是覆蓋整條AI產業鏈的結構性機會。

高盛看好中國AI價值鏈的理由包括估值低配、政策支持與產業催化。該行估算，目前中國AI相關市值約4兆美元，占全球AI相關市值約10%、AI相關收入約16%，但全球共同基金經理截至2026年1月對中國科技配置占比僅1.2%，顯示仍處明顯低配。高盛並指出，中國5月晶片銷售額年比大增111%，整體出口年增19.4%，主要受AI硬體需求帶動；同時，中國主要交易所調整基準指數、納入更多AI與半導體公司，長鑫存儲獲准登陸科創板等IPO提速，也可能引導被動資金流向戰略科技領域。

news.Title: 【公告】世界 2026年6月合併營收59.77億元 年增33.57%
《日股早盤》AI/半導體嗨 日經衝1,361點；商社跌
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-09 10:40:22 蔡承啟 發佈

美國科技股昨日(8日)走揚，帶動日本AI、半導體相關股漲勢，激勵日經225指數9日強彈，早盤收盤(台北時間上午10點30分)大漲2.04%或漲1,361.50點，暫收68,180.55點。

東證股價指數(TOPIX)早盤收盤漲0.46%或漲18.45點，暫收4,024.88點。

截至早盤收盤為止，東證Prime上漲家數637家、下跌家數852家、維持平盤家數63家。東證Prime成交額為4兆9,143億日圓。

就類股表現來看，截至早盤收盤為止，全部33類股中、有12類股上漲，其中以電機業類股漲幅最大，其次依序為非鐵金屬、服務業和玻璃土石製品。

根據MoneyDJ XQ全球贏家系統的報價顯示，截至日本股市9日早盤收盤(台北時間上午10點30分)為止，日圓相對於美元匯率升值0.04%至162.46日圓兌1美元；日圓相對於美元匯率8日貶值0.28%，連續第4個交易日走貶。

就個股表現來看，NAND Flash廠鎧俠(Kioxia)早盤狂飆8.45%、晶片設備巨擘東京威力科創(TEL)早盤飆漲5.72%、測試設備商愛德萬測試(Advantest)早盤狂飆7.41%、晶圓切割機廠DISCO早盤飆漲4.92%、MLCC龍頭村田製作所(Murata)早盤飆漲4.80%、生產AI資料中心用光纖的Fujikura早盤飆漲4.87%。

日本媒體Kabutan指出，愛德萬測試、TEL、鎧俠早盤漲幅分別為日經225指數帶來492.37點、387.18點、142.44點漲點，漲點貢獻度分居日經指數成分股前3大。

日本商社股走軟。三菱商事(Mitsubishi)早盤下挫1.48%、三井物產(Mitsui)早盤跌1.31%、住友商事(Sumitomo)早盤跌0.03%、丸紅(Marubeni)早盤下挫1.59%

news.Title: SK海力士ADR爆逾7倍超額認購！記憶體族群歡呼南亞科亮燈漲停 分析師看法出爐
news.Content:
南韓記憶體大廠SK海力士即將赴美掛牌，規模高達280億美元（約新台幣8991億元）的美國存託憑證（ADR）發行案，不僅有望改寫外國企業赴美IPO規模紀錄，更傳出已獲逾7倍超額認購。激勵台股記憶體族群今（9）日同步走強，南亞科（2408）率先亮燈漲停鎖住435.5元，華邦電（2344）盤中也勁揚逾8%。分析師表示，市場看好SK海力士ADR發行，加上韓股反彈帶動，推升記憶體族群表現，但仍難判定族群是否能一鼓作氣持續上攻。

南亞科盤中一馬當先、亮燈漲停鎖死在435.5元，擺脫先前疲弱走勢。截至上午10時25分，華邦電衝上182元，大漲逾8%；群聯（8299）和廣穎（4973）也漲逾半根停板。另外，晶豪科（3006）、鈺創（5351）、南茂（8150）同步攻上漲停板。

華冠投顧分析師陳韋廷表示，記憶體族群表現強勁，主要受到海力士即將赴美掛牌ADR引發市場搶購的激勵，加上韓國股市在經歷槓桿問題帶來的修正後，今出現約 3% 的反彈，帶動台灣記憶體族群順勢上攻。

陳韋廷指出，南亞科為族群最強勁指標股，技術面上，雖先前受到三星和海力士修正拖累，打到350-400元中線支撐，近期回測也未跌破上周低點，顯示支撐力道穩固。華邦電雖隨之轉強，但先前曾一度跌破支撐後才拉回；群聯等個股，儘管財報表現優異，但目前線型仍相對弱勢。

陳韋廷續指，族群基本面支持力道強勁，第三季漲價已成定局，且預期到 2027 至 2028 年可能都處於供不應求的狀態，但仍須關注市場資金動向，因為即使利多頻傳，股價也可能出現顯著修正。目前美光的線圖表現尚不強，因此難以判定族群是否能一鼓作氣持續上攻，不過他也說，近期回檔是不錯的進場機會。

SK海力士7月10日美國掛牌 爆逾7倍超額認購

南韓記憶體大廠SK海力士將於10日在美國那斯達克掛牌，透過發行美國存託憑證（ADR）募資280億美元（約新台幣8991億元），有望創下外國企業赴美IPO最大規模紀錄。募集資金將用於建設龍仁半導體聚落一期晶圓廠、清州P&T7先進封裝廠，以及採購包括極紫外光（EUV）曝光機在內的先進製造設備。

根據外媒報導，SK海力士此次ADR已獲逾7倍超額認購，吸引多家國際大型機構投資人參與，顯示即使近期全球半導體股震盪，市場對AI高頻寬記憶體（HBM）龍頭的投資熱度依舊不減。公司本周正式啟動ADR發行，計畫發行1779萬股新股；若以募資規模計算，此次交易也可望成為全球歷來第二大股票發行案，僅次於SpaceX日前創下的857億美元IPO紀錄。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 記憶體恢復記憶！ 南亞科、鈺創、晶豪科強勢攻漲停
news.Content:
記憶體集體回神！受惠於AI浪潮引發記憶體缺貨潮、DRAM合約報價續揚，南亞科、鈺創、晶豪科今（9）日強攻漲停，華邦電大漲逾8%，旺宏、群聯漲逾6%，力積電、威剛也有逾3%的漲幅，一掃日前下挫的陰霾。

大摩在近日發布的記憶體產業報告中表示，記憶體產業正逐漸逼近「變化速率頂峰（Peak Rate of Change）」，未來記憶體成長斜率會開始放緩，這也讓記憶體族群在8日表現疲軟。

所幸今日行情迎來大反轉，記憶體模組大廠威剛（3260）公布6月營收，受惠於DRAM及NAND Flash的價格走揚，6月營收來到146.6億，連4月創新高，股價也跳空開高來到417元，上漲3.22%，帶動其他記憶體類股同步上攻，南亞科、鈺創、晶豪科衝漲停，華邦電大漲逾8%，旺宏、群聯漲逾6%。

威剛董事長陳立白表示，記憶體原廠已通知第三季DRAM合約價格將再調升20%至30%，NAND Flash價格也預估上漲35%至40%，顯示市場仍處於供不應求格局，看好AI應用對記憶體的剛性需求持續成長，將持續挹注公司營運。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 國信證券稱北向資金Q2流入A股2193億元人民幣，創紀錄新高
news.Content:
【財訊快報／劉敏夫】外電報導指出，國信證券方面表示，今年第二季北向資金整體流入A股2,193億元人民幣，創下陸股通開通以來季度新高。北向資金增配出海鏈、算力晶片較多，減配消費、紅利較多。吳信坤等國信證券分析師在報告中指出，第二季陸股通占A股自由流通市值比重自第一季的5.1%提升至5.5%。

第二季外資流入寧德時代、中微公司、寒武紀等較多，流出三環集團、貴州茅台、天孚通信等較多。

此外，第二季外資轉為流入港股約494億港幣，是2024年以來首次季度性流入。

外資持股金額約為16兆港幣，占港股整體的比重約為55%，較第一季的56%延續下滑。

港股外資主要流入科技、有色類股等，但在科技類股定價權整體回落明顯。

news.Title: 外資續減碼日股；日人大買海外股票、今年第3高
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-09 09:11:29 蔡承啟 發佈

外資連2週減碼日股，續賣日本中長債。而日本投資人(日人)大買海外股票，週買超額創今年來第3高水準。

日本財務省9日公佈統計數據指出，上週(6月28日-7月4日)外資在日本股市賣超222億日圓，連續第2週減碼日股；2026年迄今(截至7月4日為止)外資買超日股的累計金額縮小至8兆3,318億日圓。

上週外資賣超日本中長期債券金額為59億日圓，連續第5週站在賣方；買超日本短期債券金額為237億日圓，3週來第2度站在買方。

總計外資上週流出日本金融市場的資金總額為44億日圓，連續第5週呈現淨流出。

上週日本投資人(日人)在海外股市買超8,245億日圓，連續第3週加碼海外股票，週買超額創13週來(3月29日-4月4日當週以來、買超1兆4,343億日圓)新高、今年來第3高水準；2026年迄今(截至7月4日為止)日人對海外股票轉為買超、金額為1,215億日圓。

日人上週賣超海外中長期債券金額為2,181億日圓，連續第2週站在賣方；賣超海外短期債券金額為1,243億日圓，3週來首度站在賣方。

總計日人上週流入海外金融市場(=流出日本金融市場)的資金總額為4,821億日圓，連續第3週呈現淨流入。

news.Title: 日本投資人淨買進海外股票8245億日圓，外資續賣日股但賣壓大幅降溫
news.Content:
【財訊快報／陳孟朔】日本週四公布最新資金流向數據顯示，截至7月3日當週，日本投資人淨買進海外股票8245億日圓，遠高於前值1477億日圓，顯示在日圓偏弱與全球股市震盪背景下，日本資金仍持續尋求海外股票資產配置機會。外資對日本股票則連續呈現淨賣超，但賣壓明顯收斂。數據顯示，外資當週淨賣超日本股票222億日圓，前值為大幅淨賣超1兆8165億日圓。這代表外資對日股態度仍偏謹慎，但前一週急撤資後，短線賣壓已有大幅降溫跡象。

債市方面，外資當週淨賣超日本債券59億日圓，前值為淨賣超4937億日圓，顯示外資對日本債市的減碼幅度也顯著縮小。市場人士指出，在日本央行(日銀)政策正常化預期、日圓匯率波動與全球殖利率變化交錯影響下，外資對日本債券仍維持觀望，但撤出力道已不如前週劇烈。

分析人士認為，這組數據反映日本資金仍積極外流布局海外股票，而外資對日股與日債雖未恢復淨買超，但賣壓明顯緩和。

news.Title: 威盛要買2萬張股藏股！ 日期、價格區間一次看
news.Content:
威盛董事會決議啟動第五次庫藏股買回計畫，預計在48.65至90元區間內斥資最高18億元買回2萬張股票，藉由註銷股本提升每股盈餘，展現維護公司信用與股東權益決心。

決議買回2萬張庫藏股

威盛（2388）8日發布重訊公告表示，為了維護公司信用以及股東權益，經董事會決議將正式實施第五次買回庫藏股計畫。威盛電子預計自民國115年7月9日起至9月8日期間，於集中交易市場買回2,000萬股（即2萬張）普通股，預計買回的股份約占公司已發行股份總數的3.60%。

庫藏股買回區間48.65～90元

根據公告內容表示，本次庫藏股買回的區間價格設定為每股新台幣48.65元至90.00元之間。威盛指出，若未來公司股價低於所定的區間價格下限時，將授權董事長繼續執行買回股份。本次買回計畫預計所需金額上限為新台幣18億元，而依法令規範的公司買回總金額上限則可達新台幣139.05億元。本次買回的庫藏股將依據證券交易法規定，預定於買回日起的六個月內辦理銷除股份之變更登記。透過註銷股本，將有助於提升每股盈餘（EPS）與維護整體股東權益。

（封面圖／翻攝自威盛臉書）

news.Title: 創新高！ 群聯6月營收「年增300%」潘健成：訂單能見度看到2027
news.Content:
NAND儲存大廠群聯電子今（9）日公布2026年6月營收達248.53億元，年增逾300%，刷新歷史單月新高；上半年累計營收首度突破千億大關。執行長潘健成強調，AI基礎建設使NAND儲存需求強勁，某些專案能見度已看到2027年上半年。

群聯6月營收飆新高

群聯（8299 ）公布2026年6月份的營運結果。受惠於市場強勁需求，群聯單月合併營收達到新台幣248.53億元，與上月相比成長9%，較去年同期更大幅增長超過300%，創下該公司歷史上最高的單月營收紀錄。同時，第二季營收678.88億元，季增66％、年增280％，同步創單季新高，累計上半年營收1,088.55億元，年增243％，首度突破千億元大關。

訂單能見度已看到2027

群聯執行長潘健成表示：「隨著AI基礎建設持續擴大，生成式AI正迅速從模型訓練轉向大規模的AI推理，全球對NAND儲存的需求依舊異常強勁。市場供應持續緊張，且沒有明確的緩解跡象。我們看到來自雲端服務提供者（CSP）和AI相關客戶的訂單動能持續穩固，某些專案的能見度甚至已經延伸到2027年上半年。這進一步堅定了我們的信念，即生成式AI數據的爆發式增長將持續驅動儲存的長期需求，而高性能、高可靠性的企業級儲存基礎建設，仍將是AI生態系統的關鍵基石。」

核心產品營收表現驚人

潘健成談到，在今年6月份，群聯的行動裝置控制晶片出貨量年增長達47%，顯示出在全球智慧型手機出貨量整體下滑的背景下，群聯依然展現了市佔率持續擴大的實力。在另一項核心產品線上，群聯的PCIe SSD啟動碟（Boot Drive）產品營收表現驚人，較去年同期飆升了5,600%，這反映出通用伺服器、AI伺服器以及AI網路應用的強烈需求。

改變策略淡出零售市場

潘健成指出，以價格導向為主的零售儲存市場已經不再是群聯的戰略重心。群聯預期，零售相關的營收隨著時間推移，將會逐步下降到總營收的5%以下。在AI基礎建設快速擴張的支撐下，企業級SSD（Enterprise SSDs）與其他高價值的AI儲存解決方案，預計將貢獻越來越高的營收佔比，並成為推動群聯未來成長的核心引擎。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 國泰證券7月投資觀點，AI支撐美股，日股四大產業投資機會湧現
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】隨著6月聯邦公開市場委員會（FOMC）落幕，全球市場進入高利率、通膨與地緣政治風險交錯的新階段。Kevin Warsh接任聯準會（Fed）主席後首次會議，市場關注焦點不僅在利率決議，更在於政策溝通方式轉變、通膨預測上修與點陣圖顯示升息風險提高，未來利率波動可能加大。國泰金(2882)旗下國泰證券觀察，此市場氛圍下AI發展仍為美股主要支撐動能；日股方面，受惠企業獲利、財測利多與政策改革方向，金融、消費、工業與科技四大產業持續受矚目；債市方面，美國投等債在較高殖利率、全球經濟具韌性與實質買盤支撐下，仍具配置價值。投資人可在市場震盪中聚焦基本面穩健、具長期題材支撐的資產，分散布局AI、日股與高評級債券等結構性機會。AI快速發展帶動上半年美股頻創新高，強勁基本面可望使AI主題持續成為股市上漲的主要驅動力。國泰證券表示，目前市場仍處於AI應用早期階段，2026下半年若聯準會長期維持高利率，優質成長股、大盤股與科技股仍為主流，但受惠AI程度較小的傳統產業與中小型企業，將持續面臨高利率、高工資與高通膨挑戰，可評估將能源股作為對沖風險配置，同時具備盈餘上修題材。國泰證券指出，現行美股七巨頭（Mag-7），即微軟（Microsoft）、蘋果（Apple)、輝達（NVIDIA）、Google母公司（Alphabet）、亞馬遜（Amazon）、臉書母公司（Meta）、特斯拉（Tesla）等7家具影響力的大型科技企業，相對獲利預期修正值仍為正，近期波動主要來自市場高度集中、技術面震盪與部分IPO焦慮情緒，非基本面結構變化，且美股七巨頭現行估值已近10年低點，仍具相對吸引力。國泰證券觀察近期日本股市表現，日企獲利、財測利多及日央行溫和升息等基本面因素持續支撐大盤向上。不過，考量短期內美伊戰爭影響，國際資金信心回溫尚待時間醞釀。展望第3季，金融、消費、工業與科技仍將為日股亮點，在十七項戰略政策與日本證交所2.0改革方向配合下，對應產業與個股可望吸引資金挹注。於金融類股中銀行股尤為升息受惠題材，適合中長期投資人關注；偏好穩健配置、重視長期價值的投資人，亦可留意大型醫療保健、消費與工業等產業。隨著台灣投資人對日股配置需求升溫，國泰證券推出「日股即時報價與交易整合」服務，透過國泰證券APP提供日股盤中即時報價，並整合多週期K線圖、個股基本面、財務指標與股利政策等多元分析工具，協助投資人降低資訊落差，提升海外投資決策效率。

債市方面，國泰證券表示，美銀雖認為信用利差處於相對低檔，但對美國投等債基準看法仍偏建設性，在較高殖利率、全球經濟具韌性、Fed維持利率不變與下半年供給放緩下，美國投等債信用利差有機會在下半年緩步收窄。摩根大通亦認為投資級債市信用基本面與技術面仍屬正向；高盛則指出，美國退休基金與保險公司等追求收益型實質買盤，將支撐投等債利差表現。保險資金可望加碼配置臉書母公司Meta、微軟、亞馬遜及Google母公司Alphabet等4大雲端業者（Hyperscalers）債券，債券配置上可留意信用體質佳的科技公司高評級債券。國泰證券建議，面對Fed政策訊號轉向、利率波動可能升溫與市場集中度提高等市場變化，投資人應避免過度追逐短線行情，改以基本面作為布局核心，分散掌握AI科技股、日股核心產業與高評級債券等具支撐題材的資產，並在市場震盪時持續布局長期部位，逐步構建穩健庫存的投資基礎。

news.Title: ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) Increases Despite Market Slip: Here's What You Need to Know
news.Content:
ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) ended the recent trading session at $93.79, demonstrating a +2.95% change from the preceding day's closing price. This change outpaced the S&P 500's 0.28% loss on the day. Meanwhile, the Dow experienced a drop of 1.09%, and the technology-dominated Nasdaq saw an increase of 0.2%.

Shares of the semiconductor components maker witnessed a loss of 22.14% over the previous month, trailing the performance of the Computer and Technology sector with its loss of 1.22%, and the S&P 500's gain of 1.64%.

Analysts and investors alike will be keeping a close eye on the performance of ON Semiconductor Corp. in its upcoming earnings disclosure. On that day, ON Semiconductor Corp. is projected to report earnings of $0.71 per share, which would represent year-over-year growth of 33.96%. Meanwhile, the Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenue is projecting net sales of $1.59 billion, up 7.92% from the year-ago period.

Regarding the entire year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates forecast earnings of $3.09 per share and revenue of $6.48 billion, indicating changes of +31.49% and +8.02%, respectively, compared to the previous year.

Any recent changes to analyst estimates for ON Semiconductor Corp. should also be noted by investors. Recent revisions tend to reflect the latest near-term business trends. As a result, upbeat changes in estimates indicate analysts' favorable outlook on the business health and profitability.

Based on our research, we believe these estimate revisions are directly related to near-term stock moves. To utilize this, we have created the Zacks Rank, a proprietary model that integrates these estimate changes and provides a functional rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, running from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), holds an admirable track record of superior performance, independently audited, with #1 stocks contributing an average annual return of +25% since 1988. The Zacks Consensus EPS estimate remained stagnant within the past month. At present, ON Semiconductor Corp. boasts a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold).

Looking at valuation, ON Semiconductor Corp. is presently trading at a Forward P/E ratio of 29.51. This signifies a discount in comparison to the average Forward P/E of 47.55 for its industry.

Also, we should mention that ON has a PEG ratio of 0.81. The PEG ratio is akin to the commonly utilized P/E ratio, but this measure also incorporates the company's anticipated earnings growth rate. The average PEG ratio for the Semiconductor - Analog and Mixed industry stood at 0.98 at the close of the market yesterday.

Story Continues

The Semiconductor - Analog and Mixed industry is part of the Computer and Technology sector. Currently, this industry holds a Zacks Industry Rank of 16, positioning it in the top 7% of all 250+ industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank assesses the vigor of our specific industry groups by computing the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks incorporated in the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

news.Title: 聯電ADR8日上漲1.3122美元漲幅5.60%折台股158.43元
onsemi's Divestitures Strengthen Fab Right Strategy: Here's How
news.Content:
ON Semiconductor ON or onsemi recently announced an agreement to divest its Tarlac, Philippines, manufacturing facility to Greatek Electronics and its Mountain Top, PA, facility to Silex Microsystems. Management said these actions are designed to optimize onsemi's manufacturing footprint, direct investments toward the most scalable and competitive fabs, and improve long-term manufacturing economics. Importantly, both transactions include structured transition plans and long-term supply agreements, ensuring uninterrupted customer deliveries while production is gradually transferred across onsemi's remaining network. ON expects these divestitures to generate approximately $35 million in annual cost savings, with benefits beginning in 2027 and fully realized in 2028.

onsemi's latest divestitures reinforce the company's Fab Right manufacturing strategy by reducing exposure to less competitive manufacturing assets and concentrating production in higher-efficiency, technology-aligned facilities. Rather than simply shrinking its footprint, onsemi is reshaping its manufacturing network to improve utilization, lower structural costs and support higher-margin products in AI data centers, automotive and industrial markets. Combined with rising AI-related demand and a richer product mix, these initiatives should support more durable gross-margin expansion and stronger long-term profitability.

The latest divestitures are a natural extension of the Fab Right strategy that ON management has emphasized throughout 2026. On the first-quarter earnings call, onsemi highlighted that structural manufacturing changes have already contributed to three consecutive quarters of gross-margin expansion, with non-GAAP gross margin improving to 38.5% despite a challenging demand environment. The company guided for sequential gross-margin expansion through the remainder of 2026, citing ongoing Fab Right initiatives, improved factory utilization and a leaner manufacturing model.

The strategy also complements onsemi's portfolio transformation. The company has been exiting lower-value products, prioritizing differentiated power and sensing solutions and investing in AI data center power, silicon carbide, gallium nitride, automotive electrification and intelligent sensing. The company's management has noted that improving backlog visibility, healthier bookings and expanding AI data center demand are allowing onsemi to better leverage its manufacturing base. In the first quarter of 2026, AI data center revenues grew more than 30% sequentially, which the company expects to double year over year in 2026.

Story Continues

ON Faces Tough Competition

onsemi is facing significant competition from the likes of Texas Instruments TXN and Navitas Semiconductor NVTS.

Texas Instruments challenges onsemi primarily through scale and manufacturing efficiency. TXN's $20 billion-plus 300mm capacity buildout, internalization of wafers, shutdown of older 6-inch fabs and rising utilization give it a structurally lower-cost model. Texas Instruments said first-quarter gross margin reached 58%, up 210 basis points (bps) sequentially and 120 bps year over year and implied further improvement as revenue growth, lower capital expenditure intensity and internal wafer production flow through. These factors allow TXN to compete aggressively in analog, embedded, power and data-center sockets while still operating at a far higher margin base.

Navitas is targeting high-power GaN and high-voltage SiC in AI data centers, grid infrastructure, performance computing and industrial electrification. Management said high-power revenues grew strongly, mix is shifting away from mobile, and gross margin improved to 39% (90 bps year over year and 30 bps sequentially) in the first quarter of 2026, with further gradual expansion expected through 2026. Navitas believes that focusing on high-power applications can gradually improve profitability over time because these markets typically carry better pricing and stronger long-term demand visibility.

ON's Share Price Performance, Valuation & Estimates

Shares of onsemi have appreciated 68.2% year to date, outperforming the broader Zacks Computer and Technology sector's rise of 16.6%.

ON Stock Outperforms Sector

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

The ON Semiconductor stock is trading at a premium, with a forward 12-month price/earnings of 24.32X, higher than the median of 19.6X. ON has a Value Score of D.

ON's Valuation

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for ON's 2026 earnings is currently pegged at $3.09 per share, unchanged over the past 30 days, suggesting 31.5% growth from the 2025 reported figure.

ON Semiconductor Corporation Price and Consensus

ON Semiconductor Corporation price-consensus-chart | ON Semiconductor Corporation Quote

On Semiconductor currently has a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold). You can see the complete list of today's Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here.

news.Title: Cantor Fitzgerald Updates Call on ON Semiconductor Corp (ON) Stock
news.Content:
ON Semiconductor Corp (NASDAQ:ON) is one of the best stocks to buy according to David Greenspan's Slate Path Capital. The stock makes up 7.2% of the equity portfolio. ON Semiconductor stock is already up more than 60% year-to-date, and analysts see it rising more.

On June 29, Cantor Fitzgerald lifted its price target on ON Semiconductor Corp (NASDAQ:ON) shares to $110 from $100 while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. The brokerage noted that the AI infrastructure buildout is fueling demand for semiconductor components. It noted that industry revenue could hit $3 trillion by 2029 and expand to over $3.5 trillion by 2030.

Notably, Cantor Fitzgerald updated its call on ON Semiconductor on the back of the company's deal to acquire Synaptics. ON Semiconductor, also known as Onsemi, expects the Synaptics deal to strengthen its AI business and expand its total addressable market by $30 billion to $243 billion by 2030.

The $7 billion all-stock Synaptics deal is expected to close in mid-2027 and bolster the company's capability to meet the demand from customers seeking intelligent systems.

Arizona-based ON Semiconductor Corp (NASDAQ:ON) manufactures and supplies power and signal management semiconductor components that support a variety of applications. The company's products are used in defense systems, industrial systems, medical devices, cars, and consumer products.

While we acknowledge the potential of ON as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. news.Title: Arm Holdings' Licensing Momentum Continues to Fuel Revenue Growth
news.Content:
Arm Holdings ARM continues to capitalize on robust demand for its semiconductor intellectual property, with its latest quarterly results highlighting licensing as a key growth engine.

In the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, total revenues climbed 20% year over year to $1.49 billion. While the royalty business remained a significant contributor, licensing and other revenues once again delivered the strongest growth, underscoring sustained customer demand for ARM's technology.

The company continues to benefit from rising investments in artificial intelligence, cloud computing, mobile devices and custom silicon. As chipmakers increasingly design specialized processors for AI workloads and high-performance computing, ARM's architecture has become an essential foundation for product development, supporting a healthy pipeline of new licensing agreements and long-term customer relationships.

Licensing and other revenues surged 29% year over year to $819 million, making it the primary driver of ARM's top-line expansion during the quarter. Growth was supported by previously signed agreements, as well as the timing of several high-value licensing contracts.

Meanwhile, ARM's royalty business continued to provide a stable stream of recurring revenues. Royalty revenues increased 11% year over year to $671 million, driven by broader adoption of Armv9, increasing deployment of Arm Compute Subsystems (CSS), and the growing use of Arm-based processors in data center infrastructure.

For investors, the takeaway is straightforward: strong licensing demand continues to strengthen Arm Holdings' competitive position. As customers accelerate investments in AI infrastructure and next-generation computing, ARM appears well-positioned to benefit from a growing pipeline of licensing opportunities while simultaneously expanding its high-margin royalty base, providing multiple long-term drivers of sustainable growth.

How Arm Holdings Stacks Up Against Key U.S. Peers

NVIDIA NVDA dominates the AI accelerator market with its GPUs and networking platforms. Unlike Arm Holdings, which primarily generates revenue through licensing and royalties, NVIDIA designs and sells complete hardware and software solutions. While NVIDIA's growth is driven by direct chip sales, ARM benefits as more semiconductor companies adopt its CPU architecture to develop AI-optimized processors, making the two companies complementary in many AI deployments rather than direct competitors.

Advanced Micro Devices AMD competes in CPUs, GPUs and data center processors, focusing on designing and selling semiconductor products. ARM, in contrast, licenses its processor architecture to a broad ecosystem of chipmakers. As demand for custom AI chips and energy-efficient computing grows, AMD competes through product innovation, while ARM benefits from broader adoption of its intellectual property across multiple customers and end markets.

Story Continues

ARM's Price Performance, Valuation and Estimates

The stock has surged a massive 175% year to date, significantly underperforming the industry's 46% rally.

news.Title: Can 800V AI Power Systems Fuel Navitas' Next Growth Phase?
news.Content:
Navitas Semiconductor NVTS is positioning itself to benefit from the growing shift toward 800-volt (800V) power architecture in AI data centers. As AI workloads become more power-intensive, hyperscalers are moving to higher-voltage power systems to improve efficiency and support higher power levels. This shift is expected to increase the demand for NVTS' gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) power chips and create a significant growth opportunity for the company's high-power business.

The move to 800V power systems increases the amount of GaN and SiC content used in each AI system. Management expects power supply units to increase from about 5-10 kilowatts to 18.5 kilowatts for NVIDIA systems and up to 25-30 kilowatts for other hyperscalers. As power levels increase, Navitas expects the amount of SiC content per rack to increase by about 2.5 times. GaN demand is expected to rise as more power conversion moves inside AI racks, where higher efficiency and faster switching are needed. These factors create a larger revenue opportunity per AI system for NVTS.

To support this opportunity, Navitas has launched new GaN and SiC products for AI power systems. During the first quarter of 2026, the company launched a 20-kilowatt 800V-to-6V GaN platform for AI data centers and introduced new Gen 5 SiC products for AI power supplies. The above-mentioned products are being tested by OEMs and power supply vendors, and several projects have moved from device-level testing to board-level testing, bringing them closer to commercial production.

The AI opportunity is already supporting the company's business. Revenues in the first quarter increased 18% sequentially, driven by growth in high-power markets. Further, AI infrastructure revenues grew 50% sequentially, and the company expects this business to continue growing through 2026. As more AI data centers adopt 800V power systems, Navitas is well-positioned to benefit from higher chip content and increasing demand for its power semiconductor products.

How Competitors Fare Against NVTS

The company faces strong competition from ON Semiconductor ON and STMicroelectronics STM in the race to supply high-voltage solutions for AI data centers.

In June 2026, ON Semiconductor introduced GaNEXUS, a new GaN power semiconductor portfolio designed for AI data centers, industrial automation, robotics and energy infrastructure applications. This new portfolio includes GaNEXUS FETs with voltage ratings from 40V to 650V, along with 650V GaNEXUS Smart devices that include built-in protection features to simplify system design and improve reliability. The new devices provide faster switching speeds, lower switching losses, higher power density and better thermal performance than conventional silicon-based power devices to help customers build smaller and more efficient power systems.

Story Continues

STMicroelectronics introduced new 700V GaN power semiconductors in May 2026, designed to improve energy efficiency and power density in AI servers, robotics, industrial systems and advanced consumer applications. The new PowerGaN devices are designed for high-voltage power supplies and support reliable operation in high-power applications. The devices should help improve power conversion efficiency beyond what is possible with conventional silicon-based technologies.

NVTS' Price Performance, Valuation & Estimates

Shares of Navitas Semiconductor have rallied 95.9% year to date compared with the Zacks Electronics – Semiconductors industry's growth of 46%.

news.Title: Can Ultra Clean Benefit From Rising AI-Driven WFE Spending?
news.Content:
Ultra Clean Holdings UCTT appears well-positioned to benefit from rising wafer fabrication equipment (WFE) spending as AI-driven semiconductor investments continue to accelerate. UCTT supplies critical subsystems, gas and chemical delivery systems, process modules and ultra-high purity cleaning services that support semiconductor manufacturing, providing broad exposure to expanding AI infrastructure buildouts.

The strongest opportunity stems from rising investments in leading-edge foundry logic, high-bandwidth memory and advanced packaging as hyperscalers expand AI data center capacity. Increasing process complexity is driving greater equipment intensity, particularly in deposition and etch applications, where UCTT has meaningful exposure through its precision subsystems and modules. Improving fab construction visibility and customer capacity planning continues to support expectations for a multiyear semiconductor investment cycle. Revenues increased 2.9% year over year to $533.7 million in the first quarter of 2026, supported by a favorable product mix and higher factory utilization.

Ultra Clean is strengthening its competitive position through its UCT 3.0 strategy, which emphasizes ramp readiness, regional engineering centers, digital transformation and faster new product introduction cycles aligned with customer technology roadmaps. Centres of excellence across the United States, Europe and Asia position engineering resources closer to customer operations, supporting future market share opportunities as WFE investment broadens beyond leading-edge logic into memory and advanced packaging. The global footprint supports nearly $3 billion in annual revenues and can scale to $4 billion with modest incremental capital investment, providing headroom for higher WFE-linked demand.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for 2026 revenues is pegged at $2.53 billion, up 22.9% year over year, suggesting Ultra Clean should benefit from a prolonged AI-driven WFE upcycle.

UCTT Faces Stiff Competition

UCTT faces competition from Ichor Holdings ICHR and Entegris ENTG, both direct beneficiaries of rising WFE spending. Ichor Holdings supplies fluid delivery subsystems used in semiconductor capital equipment, while Entegris provides advanced materials and contamination control solutions essential to wafer fabrication. As AI-driven WFE investments accelerate, both Ichor Holdings and Entegris are positioned to compete with UCTT across overlapping semiconductor manufacturing applications.
